Name: Ignite Healthcare
Description:
Mobile National Allied Health Provider servicing NDIS, Home Care Package and private paying participants across Victoria, Queensland and via telehealth.

Physiotherapy | Occupational Therapy | Speech Pathology | Positive Behavioural Support


Ignite Healthcare was founded in 2018 with two Davids, a car boot crammed with physio gear, and one big dream: care should be personal, not one-size-fits-all. It was never about ticking boxes - it was about showing up, connecting, and actually making a difference.

Fast forward, and what started as a dream has grown into something incredible. Now, we’re an interdisciplinary community working across Melbourne and Brisbane, all driven by the same goal: care that’s as meaningful as it is impactful. Because at Ignite, it’s always been about people first - and that’s never changing.


 Looking for supports? 
 Head to www.ignitehealthcare.com.au

Ready to start your career with us?

Name: EPPUR
Description:
Freiner en fauteuil roulant aujourd'hui revient à utiliser ses mains comme des plaquettes de freins : brûlures, efforts importants à faire dans les bras et problèmes d'accessibilité. Avec Dreeft, 1ᵉʳ système de freinage pour fauteuil roulant, c'est terminé !

Dreeft est une paire de roues adaptable à n’importe quel fauteuil roulant manuel. Une simple action vers l'arrière de la main courante entraîne un freinage progressif au centre de la roue.
 100 % des brûlures sur les mains supprimées
 5x moins d'efforts pour un freinage identique
 Entièrement fabriqué en France

Dreeft redonne ainsi de l'autonomie, du confort et de la sécurité aux utilisateur.ice.s de fauteuils roulants manuels.

Dreeft est aussi parfaitement compatible avec les 5ᵉ roues de propulsion électrique (Smoov, Smartdrive, Yomper) pour garantir un soulagement lors de la propulsion, sans compromis sur la sécurité !

 Vu sur M6 - QVEMA Saison 4

Name: Aide à domicile La Branche
Description:
Bienvenue sur la page officielle de la Branche de l’Aide, de l’Accompagnement, des Soins et des Services à Domicile, plus souvent désignée sous l'appellation de "Branche de l'Aide à Domicile" ou "BAD".
Elle regroupe les acteurs associatifs du secteur non lucratif qui œuvrent chaque jour au service des personnes en situation de fragilité, de la naissance à la fin de vie, à leur domicile : personnes âgées, en perte d'autonomie, en situation de handicap, familles et petite enfance.
Retrouvez ici nos actualités, nos métiers, et les actions portées par les partenaires sociaux de la Branche.

Name: Torch it
Description:
At Torchit, we believe that disability should never limit dignity. Since 2017, we have been developing affordable and innovative assistive technologies to empower persons with disabilities (PwDs) — not just through tools, but through opportunity.

Starting with a single product, today we offer over 700 smart solutions across mobility, education, communication, and inclusive play. Our AI-powered assistive devices are designed to enhance independence, restore confidence, and improve everyday life.

But we go beyond technology. Torchit is building an ecosystem of financial independence by creating employment opportunities for PwDs, enabling them to support their families and live with pride.

We are humbled to have impacted over 1 million lives — and these aren’t just individuals, but 1 million families we’ve been able to uplift.

Let’s build an inclusive future, together.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Tender Loving Care Disability Services
Description: Tender Loving Care Disability Services has over 100 years of combined experience in the disability sector providing excellent outcomes for people with an intellectual, physical or cognitive disability and those participants that suffer from mental health conditions. We also assist participants that want to be more connected with the local community and participate in a range of learning opportunities.  Tender Loving Care Disability Services will provide you with guidance, planning and support - enabling participants to understand how the NDIA Plan funding can be used.  Our offices in Sydney, Brisbane and Melbourne will support you to have choice and control.

Name: Reable Nederland
Description:
Reable Nederland is opgericht vanuit een heldere bedoeling: mensen zijn meester van hun leven. Dit geldt voor ouderen die hulp nodig hebben én voor hulpverleners die hen ondersteunen. We geloven dat goede hulpverlening begint met luisteren naar wat mensen zelf willen. Daarom werken we aan een manier van hulpverlenen waarbij we niet overnemen wat mensen zelf kunnen, maar hen helpen hun eigen leven te leiden.

Deze verandering gaat verder dan alleen het contact tussen hulpvrager en hulpverlener. Het vraagt om een beweging van een complete organisatie. Van de werkvloer tot de bestuurskamer, van ondersteunende diensten tot beleid. Iedereen die bijdraagt aan de ouderenzorg speelt een rol in deze verandering. Want alleen als de hele ouderenzorg werkt vanuit dezelfde bedoeling, kunnen we mensen echt helpen meester te blijven van hun leven.

Als vereniging brengen we organisaties bij elkaar die deze visie delen. Samen leren we het gesprek met ouderen te voeren zonder de antwoorden voor ze in te vullen. We ontdekken hoe er vele manieren zijn om aan te sluiten bij hun wensen en behoeften. En we onderzoeken hoe we onze organisaties zo kunnen inrichten dat deze manier van werken vanzelfsprekend wordt. Het is een beweging waarin we elkaar helpen om het anders te doen.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Disability Events Community
Description:
The Disability Events Community (The DEC) is dedicated to empowering individuals living with disabilities and their families by providing accessible, informative, and community-centered events. 

Our mission is to bridge the gap between those in need of services and the local providers who can offer support, guidance, and practical solutions.

We specialise in organising local events, expos, and forums where individuals can directly connect with trusted disability service providers. Whether you're seeking advice on care options, specialized equipment, or community resources, The DEC events bring together a broad range of professionals to answer your questions, provide recommendations, and make navigating the disability landscape easier.

At The DEC, we believe that community support is key to ensuring everyone has access to the resources they need to live their best life. Our events foster connection, education, and advocacy for people living with disabilities and their families, helping them navigate their journey with confidence and informed choices.

Join us at our next event to discover the local services and solutions available to support you or your loved one. Together, we can make a difference!

Name: Les Papillons Blancs du Finistère
Description:
L’association des Papillons Blancs du Finistère est une association loi 1901 créée en 1961, affiliée à l’Union Nationale des Associations de Parents et d’Amis de Personnes Handicapées (UNAPEI) reconnue d’utilité publique, et forte de plus de 250 familles adhérentes. 
L’Association est au service de 1.650 personnes en situation de handicap mental, ayant des difficultés plus ou moins importantes de réflexion, de conceptualisation, de communication ou de décision, quelle que soit l’origine de ce handicap. 
Ces difficultés nécessitent un accueil et un accompagnement humain adaptés aux besoins et à la situation de chaque personne, sous la forme d’un projet individualisé d’accompagnement. Pour cela l’Association compte 62 établissements et services et près de 1.000 professionnels dédiés à l’accompagnement de tout au long de leur vie : dès la naissance et jusqu’à la retraite.

Name: Ability Choice Care
Description:
Ability choice care is a  registered NDIS provider established to empower participants, deliver insightful and integral care, and pursue the achievement of participants goals and aspirations. Ability Choice Care values the participants choice, and understands the complexity and hassle of finding the right support and service.

Our Aim

As a company passionate about our services, we are committed to ensuring all participant aspirations are fulfilled, and their goals are brought to life. Our ethical and unique approach to disability care encompasses flexible and responsive services, based on your individual priorities, needs and preferences.

Support & Services

Looking to Indulge in a wide range of versatile, fun and exciting activities that are unique to your individual wants and needs? Ability Choice Care has you covered! Our extensive staff are trained in a variety of supports and services including core, capital and capacity building. Our core staff assist with daily life activities, social and community participation, as well as transportation among other needs. Our team is also highly trained to deliver capital services including support for an investment, such as assistive technologies, equipment and home or vehicle modifications, or funding for capital costs. Our capacity building focuses on support that helps participants build their independence and skills. Whether this may be through recreational activities, leisure activities, or simply engaging with fellow participants and the wider community, our carers are enthusiastic about satisfying your deepest desires, building confidence and developing new skills.

Name: Careseekers
Description:
Careseekers is an online marketplace directly connecting people looking for in-home care and support with care and support workers looking for work. Our focus is aged, disability and post-operative care. 

This direct connection makes care and support: 
- affordable - care and support workers set their own rates or can work within your budget. 
- tailored - you choose the worker and they will provide the care and support every time
- flexible - there are no minimum hourly requirements. Care and support can be for as little as one hour or 24/7 live in. 

Careseekers is a genuine alternative to an agency and can be used by individuals, families and organisations looking to engage care and support workers.

Workers are experienced and/or qualified and have a diverse range of skills and languages.

Description:
Une association apprenante !
Pour rendre possible les possibles.

L’Association Départementale des Parents et Amis de Personnes Handicapées Mentales (Adapei) des Pyrénées-Atlantiques a été fondée en 1962 pour répondre aux attentes des familles ayant un enfant déficient intellectuel. Depuis presque 60 ans, les parents et amis, membres de l’association, aidés par des professionnels, ont mené un combat sans relâche pour créer des structures adaptées à l’accueil de ces personnes.
Ainsi, l’association gère à ce jour 40 établissements et services couvrant toutes les tranches d’âge et tous les degrés de handicap. Ces établissements accueillent plus de 1800 personnes handicapées et fonctionnent grâce au concours efficace de plus de 1000 salariés qualifiés.

Name: Elderly Care India
Description:
Elderly Care India is a free, volunteer-led online platform dedicated to closing the information gap in the senior care sector across India. Our mission is to make trusted eldercare resources accessible for families, professionals, policymakers, and caregivers; both nationally and globally.

As a non-profit, non-religious, and non-commercial initiative, we focus on sharing knowledge, tools, and best practices to support dignified aging.

Key Objectives:
• Provide searchable directories of Senior Citizen Care Homes, Assisted Living, and Home Care providers across India
• Share national/international policies, schemes, standards, and guidelines on eldercare and aging
• Offer demographic insights and district-level data on India’s elderly population
• Guide stakeholders on licensing, regulations, and setup processes for eldercare facilities
• Share practical guidance on dementia, healthcare, well-being, and built environments for aging

Who We Serve:
• Families seeking senior living or home care options
• Eldercare professionals and caregivers
• Government agencies and ministries
• Researchers, students, and policy advocates
• Anyone looking to understand and improve the aging experience

Name: Heime Uster
Description:
Die Heime Uster: Pflege mit Herz und Verstand
Die Heime Uster sind eine etablierte Langzeitpflegeinstitution in der Stadt Uster, die an den Standorten "Im Grund" und "Dietenrain" ein umfassendes Spektrum an Pflege- und Betreuungsdienstleistungen anbietet. Das Angebot umfasst stationäre Aufenthalte auf offenen oder geschützten Abteilungen, Akut- und Übergangspflege, temporäre Aufenthalte, Ferienaufenthalte sowie Tages- und Nachtaufenthalte.

 Unsere Organisation
In den Heimen Uster finden über 200 Menschen ein Zuhause. Ein engagiertes Team von rund 350 Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeitern kümmert sich in verschiedenen Bereichen um das Wohl der Bewohnenden. Unsere Organisation hat die Vision und die Mission, Massstäbe für die Pflege, die Betreuung und das Wohnen im Alter zu setzen. Dabei bieten die Heime Uster den Menschen einen sicheren Lebensraum und begleiten sie mit Herz und Verstand.

 Unsere Werte
Bei den Heimen Uster ist Neugier und der Wille zur Weiterbildung unser Antrieb. Unser Verhalten beruht auf Respekt und Wertschätzung gegenüber unseren Bewohnenden und Mitarbeitenden. Klarheit und Transparenz prägen unsere tägliche Arbeit, während wir durch Kooperation und gegenseitige Unterstützung erfolgreich gemeinsame Ziele erreichen. Mit Empathie und Professionalität nehmen wir unsere Verantwortung wahr und sorgen so für ein harmonisches und unterstützendes Umfeld.

 Mehr erfahren
Besuche www.heime-uster.ch, um offene Stellen zu entdecken und mehr über uns als Arbeitgeber zu erfahren. Werde Teil unseres Teams und gestalte mit uns eine Zukunft, in der wir gemeinsam Massstäbe setzen.

Description:
At Accord Care, we recognise that you are unique, and are here to support you with expert care, when you want and how you want.

As a registered NDIS provider since 2020, our person-centred approach is aimed to help you build independence, confidence, and to live a fulfilling life. We are also registered with the Department of Veteran Affairs (DVA) to provide community nursing and other everyday supports to you.

Name: Blind Explorer
Description:
Ayudamos a las personas con discapacidad visual a moverse con autonomía y seguridad en cualquier entorno natural.

Creamos rutas GPS de alta precisión que TODOS pueden recorrer utilizando nuestra App de guiado sensorial por sonido 3D y descripciones accesibles.

Blind Explorer pone a tu disposición toda la información de un conjunto de rutas fiables y de calidad, permitiéndote consultar sus detalles y seleccionar la ruta que más te interese, para recorrerla y descubrir sus puntos de interés, aunque no tengas cobertura móvil. 

Utilizamos tecnologías avanzadas de navegación por satélite, para crear rutas GPS de alta precisión y localizar los puntos del recorrido y del entorno. Gracias a nuestra App de navegación podrás seguir los caminos y descubrir el entorno sin ayuda.

Una vez seleccionado el destino o la ruta, la aplicación genera sonidos 3D en la dirección a seguir y gracias a la capacidad que tenemos para localizar los sonidos en el espacio, serás capaz de avanzar en la dirección correcta sin salirte del camino y sin llevar nada en las manos. Según tu gusto o necesidad, podrás personalizar el tipo sonido y las indicaciones de guiado.

Para poder escuchar los sonidos 3D puedes usar cualquier tipo de auriculares, pero nosotros recomendamos usar auriculares abiertos, ya que te permiten seguir escuchando el sonido ambiente y disfrutar de todas las sensaciones que ofrece el entorno, mejorando así la experiencia “Blind Explorer”.

Con solo pulsar un botón, podrás grabar tus propios recorridos o crear tus puntos de interés, pero también podrás utilizar los recorridos que tus familiares o amigos quieran compartir contigo. Aprovecha el uso de formatos GPX estándar y utiliza también las rutas creadas por otras aplicaciones o disponibles en otras plataformas.

Para que nunca pierdas el norte, Blind Explorer incorpora una brújula sencilla e intuitiva que te permite marcar la orientación hacia la que quieres dirigirte y gracias a los sensores de tu móvil.

Name: Golden Apple Services
Description:
Golden Apple Services was founded in 2022 to infuse the "people-first" mentality of customer service with the advocacy and client-centered principles of case management. Golden Apple specializes in case management for recipients of the Aged and Disabled (A&D) and Traumatic Brain Injury (TBI) waivers in Indiana. 

Why Golden Apple?

In many ancient myths, stories, and fairytales, apples have played a significant and often symbolic role. For example, in Greek mythology, the apple symbolized love. In Norse mythology, the apple represented youth. In Jewish culture, the apple is a symbol of goodness and positivity. In many countries, including Sweden, Denmark, and the United States, the apple is a symbol of wisdom, knowledge, and education. The color gold represents success, which can only be achieved if our clients are happy. Thus, the name Golden Apple symbolizes what we represent as a company.

With this powerful motivation, DPERSPECTIVE has grown into a trusted platform that bridges the gap between patients, their loved ones, and healthcare providers. We deliver actionable health alerts and expert guidance right when you need it most—ensuring that no one ever has to feel alone in managing their health.

What We Do: We simplify health management with personalized, real-time alerts and care suggestions that allow you to take immediate action. Whether it’s tracking vital signs, spotting potential issues early, or providing expert recommendations, we give you the tools to stay ahead of your health challenges with confidence.

Our Promise: 

 Personalized Health Monitoring – Tailored insights and alerts to keep you on top of your health. 

 Expert Guidance – Timely recommendations based on real-time data, so you can make informed decisions. 

 Empowering Independence – Helping you manage your health and well-being with greater autonomy.

Join us on our mission to empower individuals and families to navigate health challenges with clarity, confidence, and control. With DPERSPECTIVE, you don’t just get a service—you get peace of mind and a partner in your health journey.

Follow us now to Stay informed. Stay empowered. Take control with DPERSPECTIVE.

Generamos contenido de calidad con la finalidad de ofrecer programación especializada en diferentes áreas de interés y beneficio para la comunidad. Canal de YouTube: www.youtube.com/@rbptvdigital

* SPECIAL MODEL FACTORY. Modelaje inclusivo y publicidad. Pasarelas y eventos de moda inclusiva.

* A través de la Fundación EL BAÚL DE PINOCHO ejecutamos programas y servicios direccionados para la inclusión económica y social, con énfasis en los grupos de atención prioritaria, personas con discapacidad y la población que se encuentra en situación de pobreza y vulnerabilidad.

Name: RevoLOOtion
Description:
1/4 of a million people in the UK require either an electric hoist or changing bench in order to to go to the toilet. Currently, there are only a small number of such public facilities around the country. Individuals and their families are forced to make the choice between being isolated at home, or risk injury, infection and the indignity of being changed on a public toilet floor in order to get out of the house. 

RevoLOOtion (run by the charity Vehicles for Change) is a not for profit organisation providing fully accessible mobile toilet facilities. Each of our vehicles for change is equipped with adult sized changing benches, electric hoists and enough space to allow up to two family members/carers to provide assistance if needed. 

Our mission is to enable disabled people and their loved ones to attend any event or activity - events from which they are often excluded due to lack of adequate facilities.

RevoLOOtion is recommended by the Changing Places  Consortium as a mobile solution, enabling those with even the most complex care needs the chance to get out of the house and enjoy the same activities as anyone else. 

RevoLOOtion provides a complete service; our facilities are attended when in operation to ensure they are kept clean, the equipment is charged and operational and to ensure proper use of the specialist equipment on board. 

Each of our units is self contained so for shorter events, no power or water connections are required.

Vehicles for Change, trading as RevoLOOtion.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

At Easy Care Disabilities, we provide a wide range of core support services that include daily activities, transportation, therapeutic support, as well as translators and interpreters to ensure effective communication between our clients and carers. Our team of carers are highly trained and experienced in providing exceptional care to individuals with various disabilities. We take pride in the diversity of our carers, who speak a variety of languages and reflect the multicultural community that we serve.

We also offer a range of community services that include community participation, life skills development, and group activities. Our community services are designed to foster social interaction, promote self-confidence, and improve the overall quality of life of our clients.

For those requiring supported accommodation, we offer Supported Independent Living (SIL) and respite care. Our supported accommodation services provide a safe and comfortable environment where our clients can live independently, while receiving the necessary support they need to achieve their goals.

At Easy Care Disabilities, we are committed to providing exceptional disability services that promote choice, control, and independence. Contact us today to learn more about our services or to schedule a consultation with one of our experienced care coordinators.

Name: Complete Choice

Name: AL Marwa Care
Description:
AL Marwa Care is an NDIS (National Disability Insurance Scheme) Support Service Provider. We provide support services across whole Melbourne. We are leading provider of disability services, offering choice and independence to the people of all age living with disabilities. 
AL Marwa Care offers a range of Support Services to help you to live Independently and improve quality of your life. We have a team of passionate and dedicated staff who aim to encourage & support people with disabilities, so they can live life to its full potential. 
We believe in you and care about you, that’s why we put you first. Our main goal is to help you achieve your goals. Name: Dementia Arts
Description:
We are the country’s leading art-based Dementia charity.
Our primary goals are to build self-esteem & confidence though carrying out our dementia friendly, structured art sessions to people living in care homes in Ayrshire.
Scientific studies show that art activities have significant impact on wellbeing and sense of identity. In addition, we believe our classes reduce isolation, increase confidence and builds social skills. At Dementia Arts, we have been privileged to be involved and witness this for ourselves. 
We are a self-funded charity and supply everything needed to carry out a class. 
Our work has been validated by the St Andrews University, and we were recognised in the Journal of Dementia Care. 

Our goal is to expand our services out with our current demographics and continue to build connections so that we can continue spreading joy throughout art in Ayrshire and beyond.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

L’équipe est composée, d’un médecin coordonnateur, d’un cadre de santé, d’un psychologue d’une psychomotricienne et des différents intervenants médicaux et paramédicaux extérieurs (médecins traitants, kiné, pédicure- podologue,) et d’une équipe soignante (AS et ASH) dédiée à l’accompagnement quotidien des résidents.
L’établissement comprend également les équipes administratives, techniques, hôtelières restauration et animation et vie sociale

Description:
Omni-Senso è la pagina dedicata all'innovazione e alla specializzazione negli ambienti multisensoriali, un settore chiave sviluppato da Pro Senectute.

Questa iniziativa nasce dalla profonda esperienza di Pro Senectute, dal 1990 leader nelle soluzioni per l'autonomia. Omni-Senso si focalizza sulla creazione di Sale Snoezelen e spazi terapeutici avanzati, dove luci, suoni, profumi e texture vengono sapientemente combinati per offrire esperienze uniche.

Cosa Offre Omni-Senso:
Progettazione e Realizzazione: Specializzazione nella creazione di ambienti multisensoriali su misura, pensati per stimolare e supportare il benessere, la riabilitazione e l'apprendimento di ogni individuo.
Tecnologie Innovative: Utilizzo delle più avanzate soluzioni tecnologiche per garantire esperienze immersive e personalizzabili, adatte a diverse esigenze e contesti, dall'assistenza sanitaria all'educazione.
Formazione e Consulenza: Supporto completo per professionisti e strutture, con percorsi formativi sull'utilizzo efficace degli ambienti multisensoriali e consulenza specializzata.
Omni-Senso rappresenta l'impegno di Pro Senectute a estendere il concetto di benessere oltre la mobilità, offrendo strumenti innovativi che nutrono i sensi e migliorano significativamente la qualità della vita. È la dimostrazione di come l'esperienza trentennale dell'azienda si traduca in soluzioni all'avanguardia per un'assistenza olistica e all'avanguardia.

Description:
Şirketimiz;
MEC ÇÖZÜM, 2016 yılında kurulmuş engelli ulaşım sistemleri alanında önceliği merdiven tırmanma cihazları olmak üzere engellilerin bir çok noktaya erişimleri ile ilgili teknolojik cihaz tasarımı ve üretimleri alanında çalışmaları devam etmektedir. Yerinde tespit çalışmaları yaparak mimari yapıya en uygun ve engellinin en konforlu şekilde kullanabileceği ürün ile buluşturmayı kendine vizyon edinmiştir.
Yeni ürünler geliştirirken, “insanlara yardım etmenin” yol gösterici ilkesi her zaman ön plandadır. Böylece, bilim ve araştırma alanındaki en yeni bulgularla
uygulanan özgün ve yaratıcı fikirlerin hayata geçirilmesi için yeni alanlar açılır.

Name: Key Word Sign Australia
Description:
Key Word Sign (KWS) is the use of signs and natural gestures to support the communication and language development of children and adults with communication difficulties.

KWS is one of the most widely used strategies utilised by people of all ages who cannot communicate by speech alone.

KWS incorporates signs from the local deaf sign language (Auslan in Australia), but unlike Auslan users, we use speech with sign, and the signing used is more simplified.

KWS can help people understand what is being said to them, and can be a way of sending a message for someone who’s speech is unclear or still developing.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Together Foundation
Description:
Together Foundation is a not-for-profit organisation and a registered public 
charitable trust, based at Mumbai. The organisation was founded by Sangeetha and V Chakrapani, parents to two adult daughters experiencing autism along with professionals in the field of medicine and disabilities.  Established in 2015, Together Foundation has completed ten years of service in the fields of autism and other special needs. 
At Mumbai, Together runs a sheltered workshop that  works with young people with autism and other intellectual disabilities. We run a bakery that is FSSAI certified, data entry for financial institutions, paper plate manufacturing unit, paper bag design unit and run the first shop that trains and employs people with intellectual disabilities.
At Hosur, Together Foundation has launched a residential project for enabling 
young adults with autism to learn to live independently: The Together 
Community.
Together Foundation is also establishing not for profit autism intervention services at Hosur for the benefit of the general public and neighboring villages. The organisation is driven by values of commitment and transparent work ethics towards empowering safety happiness and independent living for people with special needs.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Description:

 Need help? Let’s chat.

Description:

We’re all about matching clients with the right experts, delivering innovative therapies, and building trusted partnerships. Our mission is to empower independence, support wellbeing, and make quality care accessible to everyone in Victoria.

Name: AFPAI Les Cèdres
Description:
Fondée en 1970, l'AFPAI des Cèdres (Association Familiale de Parents d'Adultes Inadaptés) est une association reconnue pour son engagement envers les adultes en situation de handicap. 
Elle œuvre pour l'intégration sociale et professionnelle de ce public à travers divers établissements et services adaptés. 
L'ESAT des Cèdres emploie plus d'une centaine de travailleurs handicapés et propose des prestations dans différents domaines tels que la sous-traitance industrielle, l'horticulture, la laverie, ou encore les espaces verts.
L'association offre également des solutions d'hébergement variées dans le Pithiverais, allant des foyers de vie de jour aux appartements, assurant ainsi un accompagnement complet. 
L'AFPAI des Cèdres porte une importance particulière à son projet d'habitat et d'accompagnement inclusif territorial, visant à améliorer la qualité de vie des personnes handicapées et de mieux répondre aux évolutions de la société. 
"Nous mettons un point d'honneur à défendre les droits des personnes en situation de handicap, en leur offrant des solutions personnalisées et adaptées à chaque étape de leur parcours de vie."
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Integrity Senior Living Advisors LLC
Description: Integrity Senior Living Advisors take time to help our clients navigate the journey of locating new senior living options at no cost. Providing senior living solutions where our specialty is you! We serve Oregon, Florida and Texas.

Name: GEPH-FRANCE
Description:
Le Groupement pour l’Emploi des Personnes Handicapées (GEPH FRANCE) est une association à but non lucratif. L'association a vu le jour le 22 octobre 2013, résultant d'une initiative conjointe du GIHP Aquitaine et du GIHP National. Elle a pour objet de favoriser l’emploi des personnes handicapées, la recherche de solutions pratiques et efficaces répondant à leurs besoins, en termes d’orientation, d’information, de conseil dans le respect de leur pleine citoyenneté et pour leur intégration dans le milieu le plus ordinaire de vie. Elle a pour mission de créer, développer et gérer, dans l'ensemble du territoire français, des dispositifs, des activités et services visant à favoriser l'observation, l’orientation, l’insertion et le maintien en emploi des personnes handicapées quel que soit le handicap.
Son siège social est situé en Gironde (33) dans le sud-ouest de la France. Le GEPH est adhérent au réseau national des GIHP, une association d'utilité publique depuis 1969. Le réseau GIHP s'appuie sur plus de trente implantations sur le territoire, regroupant plus de 1600 employés et près de 35 domaines d'expertise.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Les locataires bénéficieront d'une présence 24h/24 par des aides à domicile. 
Un rythme de vie préservé, un chez soi sans vivre seul.

Le projet est soutenu par la commune de Sainte Cécile les Vignes et a été retenu par l'incubateur d'entreprenariat social Camina porté par Initiatives Terre de Vaucluse.

Follow us on LinkedIn to stay updated with the latest updates in allied health and disability support. 

Connect with us to discover how we can help you or your loved ones thrive in a supportive and inclusive environment.

Your aspirations, our mission.

The team at Ability Links get it. We have experienced the limitations that disabilities can create and are driven to support others on their journey to find what works for them when working to reduce the effect of a disability on people's lives.

 
We are run by and hire people with personal experience of living with a disability

Name: DuoDay Suisse
Description:
DuoDay est une initiative internationale, portée en Suisse par l'association Trust To Achieve (https://trust-to-achieve.com/), visant à sensibiliser les entreprises à l'importance de l'intégration des personnes en situation de handicap physique ou sensoriel.

Le concept est simple et inspirant : créer un DUO entre un stagiaire et un collaborateur de l’entreprise permettant une immersion d’une journée dans le monde professionnel.

Cette année marque un tournant important : c’est le lancement officiel en Suisse de DuoDay : rendez-vous le 10 juin 2025 !

Que vous soyez une grande entreprise, une PME, un indépendant, ou une organisation publique, participez à cette première édition ! Prenez une journée pour :

✓ Accueillir un stagiaire et découvrir ses compétences.

✓ Offrir l’opportunité à un stagiaire de s’immerger dans un métier, un secteur ou de confirmer ses aspirations professionnelles.

✓ Réfléchir à l’inclusion et la gestion du handicap (intégration de travailleur en situation de handicap physique ou sensoriel et maintien à l’emploi, réintégration de travailleur devenu handicapé en cours de carrière).

Trust to Achieve vous proposera une convention de stage et une couverture d’assurance pour le stagiaire.

Chaque année, dans plus de 10 pays, des entreprises franchissent le pas et participent au DuoDay. Pourquoi pas vous ? Rejoignez-nous en contactant Ursula Jaworski (ursula@trust-to-achieve.com, 077 460 33 95).

Plus d’informations sur le DuoDay ? N’hésitez pas à nous joindre. Le site DuoDay.ch sera en ligne dès le 15 février.

Name: Enliven Northern
Description:
Enliven provides health and disability services for older people and those with disabilities or injuries in a home or community setting. Our focus is on enabling clients to live in their own homes, engage socially with others and ultimately stay healthy for longer.

We passionately believe that everyone deserves to enjoy life, whatever their age, disability or injury. That’s why we offer a wide range of personalised, practical services to help people maximise their independence, and enjoy a happier, healthier and more sociable life.

Description:

Our services are available through the NDIS, private funding or brokerage, offering multiple avenues to ensure vulnerable persons have access to the high quality care they deserve. Name: ASBL Mat'et Eau
Description:
Mat'et Eau ASBL est une association située à Namur, qui a pour but d'offrir des activités à des personnes en situation de handicap:
La piscine, le jardin et les ateliers inclusifs (recyclage de bouchons et transformation de palettes) 

poursuivent un même but : gommer les obstacles rencontrés trop souvent dans d' autres infrastructures par les personnes en situation de handicap. Mat'et Eau propose un accueil de jour (à Mi-chemin), en semaine, pour des jeunes à partir de 18 ans, se trouvant dépourvu de solution de prise en charge à long terme. 
-Des activités valorisantes, amusantes, créatives, inclusives, 
-Des rencontres, des sorties, du temps pour soi et avec les autres,
-Un accompagnement qualitatif et bienveillant,
-Une aide et un soutien au jeune mais aussi à sa famille, du répit pour tous (jeune et proches) durant une période indéterminée.
-Un support pour les démarches,
-Des rencontres, des visites, 
Voilà ce que nous offrons à ces personnes en situation de handicap qui se cherchent un avenir. Tout cela est possible grâce à un accompagnement bienveillant expérimenté de professionnels et aussi à un réseau de bénévoles généreux et disponibles.

- Service après-vente: nous assurons également le service après-vente des moyens auxiliaires de toutes marques grâce à notre atelier entièrement équipé et notre stock de pièces détachées. Nos techniciens peuvent également se déplacer sur place avec des véhicules outillés.

Notre infrastructure: 
- Atelier entièrement équipé

- Matériel de location
- 2 bus de dépannage

Name: Support Pathways
Description:
Support Pathways is part of the Community Collective Victoria, which is a community initiative providing no-cost blended community service in low socio-economic areas. Our clients are predominantly psychosocially disabled, coming from low socio-economic background. While Support Pathways is a ‘for profit’ entity, it currently recycles 100% of its profits back into expanding biopsychosocial supports for those in low socio-economic areas. 

Our goal and vision are shared with the Community Collective Victoria, which is to create a sense of purpose and ownership among the collective members, which include the clinicians, community practitioners, volunteers, and community members. In doing so, we believe we are far more likely to see people: commit longer term and more often live community values; have an improved quality of life, and likely have fewer and less serious health issues.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: The Empowering Advocacy Method - TEAM
Description:
Online resources, a new suite of training and an all-star list of expert collaborators, this is The Empowering Advocacy Method (TEAM).  Based on the wisdom and experiences of recently retired VALID CEO, Kevin Stone, TEAM is for everyone working for the empowerment of people with an intellectual disability and anyone truly dedicated to realising the vision of a more inclusive community. 

Designed to empower people with a disability and their supporters, TEAM training is structured: 
• For NDIS Participants - where people with disability will learn about Rights, Independence and Taking Charge; 
• For Advocates and Allies - where Peers with Disability, Families, Disability Support Workers & Community Members will improve their advocacy knowledge and skills; 
• For Groups - where organisations will receive specifically designed empowerment training and resources.

As an independent advocate and champion for justice and rights, Kevin’s passion for empowerment remains strong. “The work you’ve done over the last 40+ years is beyond brilliant. To say it comes second nature to you is an understatement as what you’ve done has changed the disability world forever. Knowledgeable, compassionate & still being a trailblazer!” (Emily, Go Tafe Student)  

Kevin is joined by his daughter, Brigitte, a program facilitator and Empowerment Officer with Women with Disabilities Victoria (WDV). An accomplished writer and former magazine editor, Brigitte brings lived experience of disability – the legacy of a 2011 traumatic car accident – as well as a thoughtful intersectional approach and vitality for greater community inclusion. 

Brigitte’s own understanding of disability and Kevin’s capacity as a parent to three adult children with a range of disabilities is further reinforced by TEAM Collaborators and expert self-advocates Heather Forsyth, Uli Kaplan and Gerard Langridge.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Mayflower Supports
Description:
Mayflower Supports is a small family-run business situated in the Barossa Valley, established to address the gaps in quality support available to NDIS participants. With our personal experiences as family members of NDIS   participants and our background in the disability field, we recognise the necessity of seeing individuals beyond their disabilities or the limits of their plans, understanding them as people with unique aspirations and goals.   This insight allows us to provide more customised and inclusive support,   contributing to a brighter, more inclusive future for all. 

At Mayflower Supports, we are dedicated to empowering individuals by providing compassionate, professional services centred around your unique needs. Whether you are seeking expert counselling or require NDIS support coordination, we are here to guide and support you every step of the way.

Our team of experienced professionals offers various services, including individualised counselling, specialist support coordination, and support coordination—all tailored to help you lead a more fulfilling and independent life. We take a person-centred approach, ensuring that your goals, preferences, and aspirations are at the heart of everything we do.

At Mayflower Supports, we believe in your potential and are committed to walking alongside you on your journey, providing the support and care you deserve.

Mayflower Supports is in the process of becoming an NDIS registered provider and is proud to say that it has successfully passed its NDIS audit and complies with the NDIS practice standards.

Description:
Nurture Care Australia is committed to "Nurturing support and empowering lives" by providing comprehensive disability services that enhance individual well-being. Our offerings include Community Participation, Supported Independent Living (SIL), Specialist Disability Accommodation (SDA), Short-Term Accommodation (STA), Individualised Living Options (ILO), and support services such as transport, cleaning, lawn maintenance, and group activities. Operating across Australia, we are dedicated to making a positive difference for individuals and families through tailored, person-centred care.

Name: Linked Support Services Queensland
Description:
Empowering Abilities, Enriching Lives

At Linked Support Services Queensland, we believe in empowering individuals with disabilities to live fulfilling, independent, and meaningful lives. As a dedicated disability support provider, we offer personalised, compassionate, and inclusive services tailored to each individual’s unique needs and goals.

Why Choose Us?

 Tailored Support – We take the time to understand your needs and aspirations, creating customized support plans that align with your personal and lifestyle goals.

 Mentoring for Young People – Our specialised youth mentoring programs focus on building confidence, fostering independence, and preparing young individuals for a brighter future.

 Community & Inclusion – We are more than just a service provider—we are a partner in your journey. We encourage community participation, skill-building, and independence in a supportive environment.

 Experienced & Compassionate Team – Our team is passionate about making a difference, ensuring that every person is valued, respected, and supported in achieving their full potential.

Our Services
	•	Personalised Mentoring & Life Skills Development
	•	Community Access & Social Inclusion
	•	Capacity Building & Independence Training
	•	Support Coordination & Individualised Planning
	•	Daily Living Support & Assistance

Join Us & Start Your Journey Today!

Whether you’re looking for support, guidance, or a strong community to belong to, Linked Support Services Queensland is here to help. Let’s work together to create a pathway that enriches your life and helps you achieve your goals.

Contact us today to learn more about our services and how we can support you or your loved one!

Name: Sonder Care Group
Description:
At Sonder, we are putting the power in the hands of people with a disability. We provide our participants with the opportunity to reach their goals, and want to do it in a social, adventurous and fun way! 

We have an amazing team of youthful and energetic support workers with a variety of hobbies, interests and skills. We will match participants personalities, hobbies and interests with our employed support workers to help build a meaningful relationship from the get go. Participants then choose who they would like to meet! 

We provide both regular one on one support as well as group based adventures.

At Sonder, we provide regular support to individuals wanting to gain exposure to various life experiences. We find that these are typically interwoven into the individuals routine.

Some activities we enjoy at Sonder to promote a more physically and mentally active lifestyle may include four-wheel driving, bush hiking, fishing, snorkeling, rock-climbing, table tennis, tennis, skiing, golf, attend concerts, learning how to meditate, going to art exhibitions etc.

Description: Disability Support Services at your door step

Name: Huis Horison
Description:
Established in 1974, Horizon House is a residential and protected work centre for adult people living with an intellectual disability. We provide employment to all the 131 residents as well as to 39 day workers.

The residents need caring, growth, self-esteem, socialising and relationships. Like all of us, they too, have dreams of things they would like to do. But, being intellectually disabled, they are vulnerable and that is why they require a safe environment in which they can come into their own.

Based on their intellectual abilities and interests, the residents join one of ten work areas. This allows them to make a meaningful contribution through sewing, recycling, repair work, cooking, gardening or something else in a sheltered environment. At the same time, the work areas offer therapeutic value and all the benefits of a proper job – self-worth, recognition, pride, companionship, quality of life and hope.

Holistic and client-centered service is provided by Horizon House’s staff members, instructors, medical staff and a social worker. We also take care of their recreational and spiritual needs as well as personal development. And we support their parents and families.

Horizon House is a non-profit company responsible for its own funding. In order to run a financially sustainable centre, we have to supplement our income with donations, sales, fundraising, events and bequests. The Centre is located  on the outskirts of the Stellenbosch, Western Cape.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Our Caregivers are all full time W-2 employees who receive ongoing extensive training, education and oversight from our director of nursing. Manchester is directly managed by its owners, who oversee all aspects of operation and ensure that Manchester provides the highest quality of compassionate, individualized care for each resident.  There is a virtual tour on our website.

Name: Onari Eldercare Solutions
Description:
Our certified professional care managers help your family assess needs, discuss wishes, and find solutions to all types of aging challenges in order to help you find the options for yourself or your aging loved one.

Care management is a service provided to older adults and involved family members. 

Goals:
- Maintaining independence in activities of daily life.
- Navigating medical issues such as a crisis situation or chronic illness.
- Monitoring changes in memory and cognitive function, including dementia and Alzheimer’s concerns.
- Watching for elder abuse or financial exploitation.
- Reviewing home safety, including mobility, appliance usage, and outside structural concerns. 

We help you sort through the issues and provide recommendations to reduce worry, making sure that the older adult has the best care possible, and advocating for them every step of the way. Your loved one’s needs are at the center of all our work done together. 

Medical Care Navigation
With extensive experience helping families, we organize, coordinate, and communicate within the medical system. Effective organization and communication by an advocate improves care received leading to higher quality of life. For over 25 years our Director, Shana, has been assisting families as navigate healthcare and make important care decisions.

Care management includes attending physician appointments, monitoring ongoing care needs, attending to medical crises, reviewing hospital care, and coordinating specialized care, and communicating with involved family. Care decisions are made by the client and/or their medical power of attorney decision maker and we help carry them out.

Memory & Dementia Care
We walk with you through each step including seeking the best care, reviewing their living situation, addressing driving concerns, educating the family, finding the right care options for home, and working to meet the specific needs of the client.

Name: Senior Living Specialists of California
Description:
As our loved ones age, figuring out how to take care of them can be overwhelming, but being prepared removes the fear of the unknown and reduces anxiety. That’s where we come in. We believe “Senior living” is a journey that entails more than just where you live, and work with families to chart their senior living journeys so they have confidence in all aspects of their life. We’ve learned that every person’s situation and needs are different, and have extensive knowledge and contacts to help you with a variety of areas such as aging in place, finding senior communities, protecting and organizing your assets, finding resources, and more. 

We began as a concierge-style placement agency for seniors in the Los Angeles area, but after visiting over 150 senior living communities across the LA metro area and meeting with some of the best senior care service providers in the city, we saw the need to expand our services, and how we define "senior living" by extension, to better serve the older adults and their loved ones in our community. 

We still offer top-knotch senior living placement services—predominately in the greater Los Angeles area and Orange County—but we know that senior living communities may not be the right fit for every family, or what they want at the moment. Through our proprietary free resources available from our trusted service provider partners or our website (www.SLSofCA.com), we help families put together the right senior living plan so they're golden years are a comfortable, fulfilling, safe, and healthy time of their lives. 

Sometimes the scariest part of the journey is the first step, and especially if you're not sure where you're going. We're here to help you and family find the best route for you, and our services are always transparent and always free to the families we work with.

Description: L'Association La Paix du Soir a pour mission d’accueillir des personnes dans le besoin en offrant un environnement sécurisant, convivial, créatif, ouvert sur la vie de la communauté, multiculturel et permettant de vivre sa spiritualité.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Accessilife
Description:
At Accessilife, we’re building a disability specific listing platform that will bring together:
* disability providers (NDIS registered providers and non-registered providers, from small home-based businesses to large international suppliers);
* new and pre-loved disability products (from the most simple to the most complex, and everything in between); and
* disability specific events,
all in one central place. 

Built with love and care from lived experience, our purpose is to make life easier for people living with disability and their carers, while also shining a light on all the amazing businesses making a difference in the disability community.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Femur Connect
Description:
At Femur Connect, we are committed to supporting individuals living with a disability with their everyday life. We want to encourage NDIS participants to remain independent, and we provide the care and support they need in order to do this.
 
We understand that living with a disability can bring its challenges, and we are here to help overcome these obstacles whilst also working with each individual so they can learn and develop the skills they need to get the most out of every day and live a rewarding, fulfilling and happy life.

We also work closely with Support Coordinators to achieve a holistic, fully integrated support service that maximises each individuals NDIS funding.

here are a range of ways that we can support you here at Femur Connect depending on your goals and aspirations. To find out more about how we can help you, please feel free to reach out.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: EHPAD Les Girondines
Description: Les Girondines représentent une tentative originale de lieu de vie décloisonné et d’offre de services moderne et très complète. Le brassage des générations et des modes de vie, le partage des équipements et des activités, accompagnés par des équipes pluridisciplinaires de qualité, créent une ambiance chaleureuse, aux antipodes de l’atmosphère mélancolique des maisons de retraite d’autrefois. L'établissement compte 74 chambres, dont 8 en hébergement temporaire, et est doté d'une Unité de Vie Protégée de 14 lits, d’un Pôle d'Activités et de Soins Adaptés et d'un Pôle Santé Bien-Etre.

Name: Youzoo
Description: Faciliter l'accès au matériel médical pour les enfants en situation de handicap.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Roads To Connection
Description:
Introducing SlipStream Connect – a day options program with a difference. We're all about creating opportunities for learning, growth, and connection through motor mechanics, driving, friendship, and independent living skills.

At our Richmond workshop, participants dive into basic motor mechanics, car maintenance, and restoration. Whether you're exploring a new career path, developing a passion, or honing valuable skills, there's something for everyone. We also have a semi-professional race car driver on our team, offering hands-on experience with real race cars, attending races, and even working in a pit crew. Big projects are coming soon!

Driving with us is about more than just learning the road. It’s about building confidence, overcoming fears, and preparing for your driving journey through state-of-the-art simulations and real-world support. Our goal is to help you succeed in both the driving world and beyond.

But it's not all about cars. We’re creating a community where friendships thrive and independent living skills grow. From racing events to museum visits, every activity is an opportunity to connect, learn, and grow together. SlipStream Connect isn’t just a program—it’s a place to belong.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Association Trisomie 21 Normandie
Description: Découvrez notre association Trisomie 21 Normandie et ses services, dédiés à informer et soutenir, les personnes porteuses de Trisomie 21 ainsi que toutes celles présentant toute autre forme de handicap et leurs entourages.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Buddies4Life, LLC
Description:
Buddies4Life, LLC is a micro-provider for The Division of Services for People with Disabilities (DSPD) from Utah County to Cache County.

We provide Group Home & Residential Host Home Service designed for people with disabilities.

It is our vision to one day enrich the lives of people with disabilities in every community along the Wasatch Front.  From Santaquin, Utah at the south end of the Utah Valley, including Spanish Fork up through Provo and Orem, to Lehi and Eagle Mountain.  We will help facilitate and ensure quality environments and independent living skills for those with ABI and intellectual disabilities in the Salt Lake Valley as well. In Draper, South Jordan, West Valley, and Sandy. Creating activities that make everybody feel included in communities along the East Bench in Mill Creek, Sugar House, and the Avenues.  Up through Bountiful,  Kaysville, Roy, Clearfield, and Ogden. And every other community in between. We intend to be the brand that comes to mind first for providing loving care and personal attention to help them reach their goals. Buddies4Life's thoughtful and thorough approach will facilitate relationships that will bless and uplift all involved, we hope, 4life.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Aprosdeco
Description:
¿Qué es APROSDECO?
Somos una asociación sin ánimo de lucro de madres, padres, familiares y tutores de personas con diversidad funcional intelectual que desde el año 1974 apuesta por innovar, impulsar y poner al alcance de las personas con diversidad funcional todos los recursos y apoyos para mejorar su calidad de vida.
APROSDECO es miembro de: PLENA INCLUSIÓN CV. UPAPSA, FEAD, AGESVALCEE, FUNDACIÓN ALICANTINA PRO-TUTELAS DE LA COMUNITAT VALENCIANA , PLATAFORMA EN DEFENSA DE LA LEY DE LA DEPENDENCIA DE LA MARINA ALTA.
APROSDECO es una entidad consolidada y comprometida con valores centrados en la solidaridad, inclusión, participación, igualdad de oportunidades y gestión eficaz.
La finalidad de APROSDECO es la atención a personas con diversidad funcional intelectual o del desarrollo que bien por su situación socio-familiar, bien por sus características personales específicas, requieren una atención especializada.

En APROSDECO ofrecemos los apoyos necesarios para el máximo desarrollo posible de su autonomía por medio de servicios y programas.

Los Valores que orientan la actividad de la Asociación:

Asumimos el Código Ético de FEAPS que anuncian valores, principios y normas. Compromiso ético.
Dignidad y valor de la persona con discapacidad intelectual.
Calidad de vida
Transparencia en la Gestión
Actitud positiva

Name: New Mexico Support Network
Description:
About Us
New Mexico Support Network is a non-profit organization dedicated to empowering individuals and families in Las Cruces and Southern New Mexico through comprehensive support services.  Our mission is to bridge gaps in healthcare and community resources, fostering independence, well-being, and resilience. We collaborate with local healthcare providers, community organizations, and our sister organization, Texas Support Network, to deliver impactful solutions that address the unique needs of our community.

Our Services

Caregiver Support Programs
We work hand in hand with children and adults with complex medical needs, their families, expert medical providers, and compassionate, qualified staff to deliver the highest quality care tailored to each individual.

We provide individualized, reliable, comprehensive, and safe care that empowers children and adults with complex medical needs, supporting their active presence and meaningful participation in their homes and communities.

Our  Core Vision
To ensure that every child and adult with disabilities feels valued, welcomed, and included as a vital part of their community.

Our Purpose
To advocate for the rights of every individual with complex medical needs to live in a home and community where they are accepted, respected, and able to thrive as active participants.

Our Audience
We engage a wide range of community members, including families, educators, healthcare providers, social services, faith communities, law enforcement, and the public, fostering a culture of acceptance, respect, and inclusion.

The Problem We Solve
We ensure that every child and adult with complex medical needs can live as an accepted, respected, and active member of their home and community, bridging gaps in accessibility, care, and social inclusion.

Our Core Mission
To champion inclusion, advocacy, and support for individuals with complex medical needs, ensuring their right to a dignified, active life
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Care Partners Australia
Description:
Care Partners Australia is a specialist provider of multicultural support services providing exceptional care and support across NSW and VIC. We aim to support the venerable in our community to fulfil their full potential and impartially choose what they want their lives to be.

We love and support people belonging to all cultures, and we especially support the marginalised and vulnerable. Our staff consists of trained and compassionate members from a diverse range of communities, and so do our members.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: CSM Services Australia
Description:
Through support coordination we guide individuals and families through the complexities of the National Disability Insurance Scheme (NDIS). 

We provide personalised assistance in navigating the NDIS process, ensuring access to the right supports and services tailored to each person's unique needs. 

For participants we’ll assist you with provider connections for ongoing support, and for those providers we also provide admin support staff for all your paperwork needs. 

We are dedicated to empowering our clients to achieve their goals and enhance their quality of life.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Wise'Yins
Description:
Wise'Yins is a newly established SCIO (Scottish Charitable Incorporated Organisation) founded by Iffat and Ikra, two passionate young Scottish-Asian individuals dedicated to supporting people with Additional Support Needs (ASN) and their families within the BAME (Black, Asian, and Minority Ethnic) community.

Our mission is to bridge the gap by providing tailored support, resources, and a safe space for individuals facing challenges related to ASN. We understand the unique barriers faced by those within the BAME community, and we're committed to fostering inclusion, empowerment, and a sense of belonging. 

At Wise'Yins, we not only aim to support individuals but also to support their families, helping them navigate the complexities of ASN with guidance and understanding. Through community engagement and collaboration, we strive to make a meaningful difference in the lives of those who need it most.

Join us in our journey to create a more inclusive future for all. 
Connect with us to learn how you can get involved or access our services.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: L'Arche Calgary
Description:
L’Arche Calgary is a cherished home and vibrant community where adults with and without intellectual disabilities live, work, learn, and grow together. Our mission is to create inclusive environments where every person is valued for their unique gifts, and meaningful relationships flourish. Through our homes, Tamarack Day Program, and Supported Independent Living Program (SILP), we provide residential support, life skills development, and opportunities for social connection.

Our five homes operate as shared living communities, where Core Members (adults with intellectual disabilities) and Assistants live together, sharing daily routines, meals, household responsibilities, and celebrations. This model integrates care with community life, ensuring that support is holistic, relationship-centred, and rooted in dignity and mutual respect. Assistants and Core Members build deep, authentic connections while fostering independence, personal growth, and a sense of belonging.

What makes L’Arche Calgary distinct is this community model. Core Members are at the center of all we do, and Assistants live alongside them, helping create homes of warmth, celebration, and mutual care. Together, they cultivate environments where everyone contributes, learns, and thrives.
Beyond providing support, L’Arche Calgary fosters a culture of belonging, respect, and personal growth for everyone involved, from Core Members and Assistants to volunteers, staff, and the wider community.

At L’Arche Calgary, inclusion is lived, not just preached. We demonstrate that when people with intellectual disabilities take their place at the table, they help build a more just, compassionate, and vibrant world. Our community is grounded in friendship, dignity, and the shared journey of growth, making L’Arche Calgary a true home, a hub of hope, and a life-changing experience for all who participate.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: HISB Betreuungsdienst Herne GmbH
Description:
Betreuung zuhause für Senioren

Fühlen Sie sich durch unsere individuelle häusliche Pflege und Betreuung zufrieden und sicher – ganz nach Ihren Wünschen:

Unterstützung beim Aufstehen und Zubettgehen | Bekleidungsauswahl und Hilfe beim Ankleiden | Einkaufshilfe für Senioren | Unterhaltungen anregen und Interesse wecken | Hilfe bei der Haustierversorgung und Pflanzenpflege | Spazieren gehen, Gesellschaft leisten| Betreuung

Begleitung in die Kirche | Reisebegleitung bei Ausflügen und im Urlaub | Unterstützung bei Sport und Bewegung | Besuche im Seniorentreff | Begleitung zu Außer-Haus-Terminen (Friseur, Arzt, Kultur-Veranstaltung, private Einladung)

Hilfe bei der Körperpflege (Waschen, Duschen, Baden, Zahnpflege, Kämmen) | Inkontinenzversorgung, Hilfe beim Toilettengang | Hilfe beim Kleidungswechsel | Lagewechsel im Bett | Hilfe beim Überwinden von Treppen oder Stufen

Alltagsbetreuung zuhause für Menschen mit und ohne Demenz | Unterstützung bei den Mahlzeiten und Betreuung außer Haus | Speziell angepasste Hilfen im Haushalt | Betreuung über Nacht | Demenzpflege und Betreuung zuhause sowie spezielle Alzheimerbetreuung | Beratung zur Demenzbetreuung | Betreuung nach Krankenhausaufenthalt

Sicherstellung des Kindergarten- und Schulbesuchs | Betreuen der Hausaufgaben | Begleitung zu Freizeitaktivitäten | Hilfe im Haushalt | Erledigung von Einkäufen | Vor- und Zubereitung von Mahlzeiten | Wäsche waschen und bügeln

Name: L'Arche à Marseille
Description:
L’Arche est une fédération de communautés présentes dans 38 pays aux 4 coins du monde, où vivent et travaillent ensemble des personnes adultes en situation de handicap mental et ceux qui les accompagnent.

Les communautés de L’Arche s’engagent dans une démarche écologique alliant simplicité et sobriété dans la vie partagée en maisonnée et dans les activités proposées en journée.

Membre de L’Arche en France la communauté marseillaise a vu le jour en 2010. En tant qu’établissement médico-social agréé par le Conseil départemental des Bouches-du-Rhône, elle accueille 26 personnes adultes en situation de handicap mental au sein de ses 2 foyers de vie et de son centre d’accueil de jour.

La vie en foyer est au cœur d'une Communauté de l'Arche. Les deux foyers appartiennent à la même communauté et sont dirigées par un seul directeur, chaque foyer ayant un responsable. Chacun d'eux accueille respectivement 8 personnes en situation de handicap qui partagent leur quotidien avec des assistants, professionnels salariés mais aussi des jeunes volontaires.
Ensemble ils font alors l’expérience d’une vie partagée où chacun participe dans la mesure de ses capacités et où les liens tissés entre eux dépassent la simple relation d’aide. Le cœur de l’Arche c’est l’expérience de la rencontre, la certitude que chaque personne est unique et précieuse !

En journée le CAJ, centre d'accueil de jour, propose diverses ateliers aux membres des foyers mais également à des personnes en situation de handicap qui viennent de l'extérieur. A Marseille, ils sont au nombre de 10 à rejoindre la communauté pour la journée.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: vitadoro ag
Description:
Haushaltsdienst für Seniorinnen und Senioren in Bern West.
Wir unterstützen je nach individuellen Bedürfnissen unserer Kundschaft im Haushalt. Beim sauber machen, waschen und bügeln und Betten frisch anziehen. Erledigen Einkäufe bei Bedarf.

Ausserdem vermieten wir qualitativ hoch stehende, auf die Bedürfnisse von Menschen mit Beeinträchtigung zugeschnittene Notrufgeräte mit direkter Verbindung zur Notrufzentrale. Ein Notrufgerät schützt die Person und gibt den Angehörigen Sicherheit.

Kontaktieren Sie uns für eine individuelle Beratung oder besuchen Sie uns am Kornweg 27 in Bern. 

Unsere Mitarbeiterinnen der Geschäftsstelle beraten Sie persönlich und individuell.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Feel at Home (Luxury Assisted living for Elderly)
Description: Welcome to Feel at Home Luxury Assisted Living for Elderly. Our Elderly Care Center, led by dedicated senior medical professionals, specializes in providing exceptional assisted living services. Our mission is to create a true home for seniors, offering them comfort, respect, dignity, compassionate care, and companionship. Our goal is to foster a vibrant and inclusive community that promotes the physical, mental, and emotional well-being of seniors, ensuring their golden years are filled with joy, comfort, and a strong sense of belonging. Located in the tranquil heart of Bengaluru, our two centers provide a peaceful and secure environment for seniors. Join us in our mission to make the golden years truly golden.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: inTouch.family
Description:
inTouch is here for the sandwich generation — busy adults balancing demanding jobs, raising children, and caring for aging parents who are slowly losing their independence. We understand how overwhelming that can feel. You want to be present for your parent, but life pulls you in a thousand directions. The guilt, the worry, the longing to stay connected — we’ve been there.

That’s why we created inTouch: a simple, caring service that bridges the distance between you and your parent. We regularly call your aging parent — as often as they’d like — and have warm, thoughtful conversations about the things that matter most to them. After each call, you receive a gentle update, so you always know how they’re doing.

Your parent feels heard, valued, and connected. You feel peace of mind and relief from the pressure of always needing to do more.

There’s no app to download and no setup required for your parent — just friendly phone calls on their landline or mobile. And when you can’t reach out yourself, you can even leave a message in the inTouch app for us to read to your parent during the next call.

At inTouch, we’re not just tech experts. We’re parents, daughters, sons, and caregivers too. We know that small, thoughtful conversations can preserve memories, strengthen family bonds, and bring joy — both for older adults and their children.

We make staying connected effortless, human, and full of heart.

 Visit www.intouch.family and #beinTouchtoday
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Handi Access
Description:
La solution qui garantit l'accessibilité des places bleues aux ayants droit : les personnes à mobilité réduite.

Depuis l'enfance, je suis sensibilisé à ces problématiques par le biais de "Tonton Fredo", mon oncle.

Ces problématiques sont connues et reconnues. De ce fait, nous allons mettre en place une solution pour lutter contre ces injustices sociales !

Nous connaissons tous une personne à mobilité réduite et nous sommes tous concernés. Il s'agit d'un projet avec des valeurs d'inclusion et de respect.

Handi Access accompagnera bientôt ses utilisateurs pour rendre accessible et confortable une société qui ne les prend pas encore suffisamment en considération.

Name: Next Move Support Coordination
Description: Next Move Support Coordination was created to bridge the gaps too often seen in how support coordination is delivered. The focus here isn’t on ticking boxes, it’s on people. The team is driven by a genuine commitment to helping participants cut through confusion, feel supported, and take their next move with confidence. The aim is to make the NDIS less overwhelming and more empowering, through clear communication, strong advocacy, and a focus on what truly matters to each person.

The Måna platform solution inspires digital inclusion by combining the latest advancements in Generative AI and Industrial IoT technology. Måna will simplify care and communication between loved ones and their Trusted Advisors consisting of Caregivers and Family members.

Name: Association Grillons et Cigales
Description:
Association Grillons & Cigales

Depuis 1931, l’Association Grillons & Cigales s’engage avec passion pour l’accueil en séjours adaptés de personnes en situation de handicap.
Historiquement dédiée aux jeunes déficients visuels, l’association a su, au fil du temps, élargir son accompagnement aux personnes présentant des handicaps associés, puis aux adultes déficients visuels et polyhandicapés.

 Basée dans le Rhône, à Valsonne et Ronno, notre association met tout son savoir-faire au service de séjours bienveillants, sécurisés et riches en découvertes humaines.
Chaque séjour est pensé pour offrir autonomie, plaisir et partage, dans un environnement où la différence devient une force et où chacun trouve sa place.

 Chez Grillons & Cigales, nous croyons que le droit aux vacances et à l’évasion appartient à tous.
Notre équipe, composée de bénévoles et de professionnels engagés, œuvre chaque jour pour que ces moments soient synonymes de joie, inclusion et épanouissement.

#SéjoursAdaptés #Inclusion #Handicap #Solidarité #GrillonsEtCigales
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Wellness Australia Group
Description:
Wellness Australia Group provides support, STA and long-term accommodation for NDIS Participants and seniors.

Mission
"To improve the quality of life of people with disabilities and their families by providing integrated care, wellness and lifestyle programs in inclusive communities set in beautiful locations." 

The Luxury Selection
Situated at Hope Island, we offer a selection of luxury 5-bed, 4-bath, 3-living room houses, all with swimming pools. Our stated aim is always to have residents who rely on the aged or disability pension live in the best quality accommodation possible. With the houses located in close proximity, residents participate in community activities and build friendships, whilst working closely with our activities Partner, Gold Coast Recreation & Sport.

Honeybee Wellness Resort
Our marquee property, Honeybee offers 32-rooms for families living with a disability. Activity partners Soil To Supper and Honeybee Creative offer inclusive sustainable gardening, music, art and performance programs. Our onsite golf pro, Ellesha, is a PGA Certified All Abilities Golf Coach. Free activities include pickleball, frisbee golf and bushwalks.

PA Apartments
A 38-room city-stay hotel adjacent to the Princess Alexandra Hospital in Brisbane, specialising in alternatives to hospitalisation. Wellness Australia Group is a contractor to Queensland Health, working with most hospital and health services around QLD under the QLD Patient Transport Subsidy Scheme.

Esk Mountain View Lodge
This property includes 7 houses on a picturesque block of land overlooking the escarpment that sits over the town of Esk. With a wonderful covered outdoor area, two and three bedroom houses and easy access to the Brisbane Valley Bike Trail, Esk Mountain View Lodge is a beautiful property with a mixture of short and long term rental tenants .

Griffith Scenic Village
Our newest location is a 45-room village in Griffith, NSW offering intergenerational living and inclusive activities.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Association Nouvel Envol
Description:
Nouvel Envol est une association de droit local inscrite au tribunal de Strasbourg. Elle sise au sein de la faculté des sciences du sport de l’Université de Strasbourg au 22 rue René Descartes 67000 Strasbourg. Elle dispose de locaux (bureaux) au 3 rue de la batterie à 67118 Geispolsheim.
L’association a pour objet de promouvoir et rendre accessible aux personnes en situation de handicap, les activités physiques et sportives, les loisirs, la culture et les vacances. Ses moyens d’actions sont notamment : la mise en place d’activités physiques et sportives régulières, l’organisation de sorties de loisirs et culturelles ponctuelles, l’élaboration de séjours vacances adaptés, l’accompagnement individuel en milieu ordinaire, des actions de communication et de sensibilisation afin de faire connaître ses activités. Dans tous les cas, l’association ne poursuit aucun but lucratif, politique ou religieux.
Elle a été reconnue d’intérêt général.
Elle dispose d’un agrément Sport délivré par la Direction Régionale de la Jeunesse, des Sports et de la Cohésion Sociale (DRDJSCS – nouvellement DRAJES). Elle est affiliée à la Fédération Française du Sport Adapté (FFSA) et membre de la Ligue du Sport Adapté Grand Est (SAGE). 
Elle est immatriculée en tant qu’opérateur de tourisme et possède l’agrément vacances adaptées organisées. Elle est membre de l’Union National de Associations de Tourisme.
Nouvel Envol est également membre de la Ligue de l’Enseignement du Bas-Rhin.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Centre de gestion handicap
Description: Nos chargés d’accompagnement sont à votre disposition, du lundi au vendredi, de 9h à 18h, afin de vous aider dans la gestion de l’Obligation d’Emploi des Travailleurs Handicapés (OETH). De plus, étant présents sur l’ensemble du territoire, y compris dans les DOM-COM, le Centre de Gestion Handicap assure donc un suivi complet dans vos démarches, que vous soyez un employeur ou un travailleur en situation de handicap.

Description:

Name: Karadeniz Medikal Sag. Hiz. San. ve Tic. Ltd. Sti.
Description:
Karadeniz Medikal, 20 yıl önce Türkiye’de bedensel engellilere yönelik ürünlerin yeterli olmadığı bir ortamda bedensel engellilere yönelik ürünlerin üretimine başlayarak bir nevi bu sektörde öncü kuruluş olmuştur. İlerleyen yıllarda ürün gamını ve üretim teknolojilerini pazarın istek ve duyarlılığını göz önünde bulundurarak geliştirmiş ve sektöre yenilikler katmayı kendine ilke edinmiştir. 
Türkiye genelinde 500’ü aşkın noktada ürünlerimiz nihai tüketicilerine ulaşmaktadır. Bunun yanı bedensel engelliler dernekleri, belediyeler, vakıflar vs. birçok kuruma bu alanda ürün ve teknik servis desteği sağlamaktayız. 
İlkemiz;  günümüz yaşam koşullarında, ürün ve hizmetlerimizle hitap ettiğimiz engelli insanların, karşılaşabilecekleri olası engel teşkil eden durumları empati yeteneğimizi kullanarak tespit edip, günün teknolojik imkanları doğrultusunda optimum fayda sağlayacak çözümler getirmek, ürün ve hizmetlerimizi pazarlama, satış ve satış sonrası teknik destek safhalarında engelli insanlara, her birimizin birer engelli adayı olduğu bilinciyle sunmaktır.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Intertwined Support Services (ISS)
Description:
Intertwined Support Services is proud to be the first NDIS provider to integrate bulk billed healthcare directly into our service model, offering unparalleled medical support to our participants with an active service agreement. 

We offer a new perspective on NDIS support, blending care, empowerment, and community involvement seamlessly. Our service is tailored, focusing on the unique needs and aspirations of each person we support. We're here to enhance everyday life, promote personal growth, and help you connect with your community. With the additional benefit of round-the-clock on call medical support and NDIS accommodation, Intertwined is dedicated to your well-being and development. Explore how our integrated approach can make a real difference in your life.

Bulk Billed Care

Exclusive to our participants with an active service agreement, enjoy on-demand GP and nursing call-outs at home, bulk billed, ensuring no out-of-pocket costs.

24/7 Medical Access

Round-the-clock access to our medical team, including GPs and Registered Nurses, for immediate and comprehensive care.

First in NDIS

Pioneers in offering bulk billed healthcare exclusively to our participants, setting a new standard in integrated care.
