Description:
Loi 1901, l’association J-B Thiéry a été déclarée en préfecture de Meurthe-et-Moselle le 25 février 1988. Elle est aujourd'hui reconnue pour son expertise dans l'accompagnement de la grande dépendance.
Les publics accueillis sont porteurs de déficience intellectuelle, polyhandicap, Troubles du Spectre 
Autistique (TSA) et/ou Trouble Neuro-Développementaux (TND) avec ou sans déficiences associées.

Composée d'un Siège Social et de 9 établissements et services implantés en Meurthe-et-Moselle et en Meuse, sa capacité est de 337 personnes accueillies :

- Maison d'Accueil Spécialisée les Musicalies, à Maxéville
- Maison d'Accueil Spécialisée les Pléïades, à Commercy
- Maison d'Accueil Spécialisée la Volière, à Moyen

- Établissement pour Enfant et Adolescent Polyhandicapé Bois Fleuri, à Maxéville
- Service d'Éducation Spécialisée et de Soins À Domicile, à Maxéville
- Unité d'Enseignement en Maternelle Autisme, à Villers-lès-Nancy
- Unité d'Enseignement en Élémentaire Autisme, à Laxou
- Plateforme de répit aux aidants de personnes en 
situation de handicap, Oxygène Répit 54

Name: Maison Départementale des Personnes Handicapées (MDPH) 13
Description:
La Maison Départementale des Personnes Handicapées des Bouches-du-Rhône (MDPH 13) est un guichet unique d'accueil, d'information, d'accompagnement, de conseil, auprès des personnes en situation de handicap, de leur entourage et des professionnels.

Sur la base du projet de vie de la personne en situation de handicap, la Commission des Droits et de l’Autonomie des Personnes Handicapées (CDAPH) va ouvrir des droits à des allocations ou prestations et orienter vers des établissements ou services médico-sociaux ou vers le milieu professionnel.

La loi du 11 février 2005 pour l'égalité des droits et des chances, la participation et la citoyenneté des personnes handicapées, crée, dans chaque département, une Maison Départementale des Personnes Handicapées (MDPH). Cette dernière remplace les anciennes commissions : la Commission Départementale de l'Enfance et de la Scolarité (CDES) et la Commission Technique d'Orientation et de reclassement Professionnel (COTOREP).

Placée sous la tutelle du Conseil Départemental, la MDPH est une structure partenariale, un groupement d’intérêt public, qui associe l’État, le Département, les organismes locaux d’assurance maladie et d’allocations familiales et les associations représentatives des personnes en situation de handicap.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: La Ruche des Possibles
Description:
La Ruche des Possibles regroupe différents services : l’Equipe Relais Handicaps Rares Nord-Ouest (ERHR NO), le PCPE Polyhandicap 276 et le Centre d’Education Conductive (CEC) situé à Maucomble.

L’ERHR Nord-Ouest a pour vocation de venir en aide à toute personne présentant un handicap rare, sur la Normandie et les Hauts-de-France, soit 10 départements.

Le PCPE Polyhandicap 276 accompagne des personnes en situation de polyhandicap en rupture de parcours avec de la coordination de parcours et le financement de professionnels libéraux non remboursés par la sécurité sociale. Il intervient sur la Seine-Maritime et l’Eure.

La Ruche des Possibles gère le CEC de Maucomble en fonction support de l’Association CEC76.

Tous les professionnels des différents services forment une équipe unique au sein de La Ruche des Possibles

Name: MAKATON France
Description:
- Groupe Avenir Dysphasie -
Le Makaton est un programme de Communication Alternative et Améliorée (CAA) qui vise à rendre la communication accessible à tous.

Le programme MAKATON est le seul programme multimodal, combinant la parole, les signes et les pictogrammes. Il a été initié en Angleterre par Margaret Walker, orthophoniste britannique.

 Pourquoi ? 
Son objectif est de faciliter la communication en famille, à l’école, au travail et toutes autres interactions sociales.
En facilitant les échanges, le Makaton permet aux utilisateurs et à leur entourage :
- sur le versant réceptif : de mieux se comprendre
- sur le versant expressif : de raconter une histoire, poser une question, exprimer un refus. Le Makaton rend possible l’auto-détermination : il donne à chacun le pouvoir de dire, de choisir, d’agir.

 Pour qui ?
Adultes et enfants atteints de troubles du langage associés à des handicaps divers : déficit intellectuel, autisme, polyhandicap, troubles spécifiques du langage, atteintes neurologiques affectant la communication.

Le MAKATON s’adresse également à l’entourage de la personne en situation de handicap : parents, orthophonistes, éducateurs, psychomotriciens... afin d’utiliser le même mode de communication et faciliter son apprentissage.

 Comment ?
Les mission d'AAD MAKATON : 
- Aider et accompagner les familles et les professionnels 
- Fédérer les utilisateurs MAKATON 
- Proposer des formations et des outils pédagogiques 
- Développer des nouveaux outils facilitant la communication au quotidien.

Name: Cap emploi 10
Description:
Bienvenue sur la page du CAP EMPLOI 10, l’Organisme de Placement Spécialisé de l’Aube (géré par l’Association Ohé Prométhée Aube) dédié à l’accompagnement « vers » et « dans » l’emploi des personnes en situation de handicap.

Les missions de ce service qui agit depuis de nombreuses années au gré des fluctuations législatives et politiques, visent avant tout la sécurisation des parcours professionnels des bénéficiaires, tout au long de leur vie active , ainsi que l’accompagnement des employeurs dans la mise en œuvre de leur politique d’emploi de « Travailleurs Handicapés ». Les équipes déploient leurs compétences et expertises en lien avec l’ensemble des acteurs de l’orientation, de l’insertion professionnelle et de la formation, dans le respect des valeurs d’égalité des droits et des chances des personnes.

L’ancrage territorial du Cap emploi 10, ne peut que venir conforter sa participation active au développement de la politique nationale en direction des personnes en situation de handicap, visant à favoriser les conditions d’une croissance inclusive à même de concilier l’économie et le social.

Name: Communauté 360 de Dieppe

Le rôle de la communauté 360 s'inscrit dans la démarche de "Réponse Accompagnée Pour Tous" qui vise à ce que chaque personne puisse bénéficier de l'accompagnement dont elle a besoin en proposant notamment un panel de prestations inclusives, avec un objectif de "zéro sans solution".

La Communauté 360 de Dieppe accompagne les personnes et leurs aidants dans la construction de la réponse à leurs besoins. Elle s’attache à fédérer et coordonner les acteurs de droit spécialisé comme de droit commun, afin d’agencer des solutions concrètes, inclusives et à proximité du lieu de vie des personnes.

En parallèle des travaux sont menés avec les membres coeur et les partenaires de la Communauté 360 de Dieppe afin de prévenir, au mieux, les risques de rupture de parcours.

CbusineZ heeft ruime ervaring met het starten van nieuwe innovaties en het investeren in veelbelovende ondernemingen. De betrokken zorgorganisaties zorgen brengen inhoudelijke expertise in.

Name: Dementia Care Solutions, LLC
Description: Dementia Care Solutions LLC offers dementia care consulting, coaching, training and workshops to care partners, both family and professionals, to better manage the care of people with dementia. It is a misunderstanding that challenging situations with dementia care are inevitable and acceptable as a normal part of the disease. People with dementia communicate through their words, sounds, tone of voice, actions, and body language. With educated and informed care partners the communication can be understood, interpreted and the solutions can be investigated that can reduce challenging situations.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: St. John of God Centre, Pampady, Kottayam
Description:
St. John of God Centre at Velloor was started in 1998 for the support and training of children and young adults with learning or intellectual disabilities. The center is auspiced by the society for the empowerment of the learning disabled (SELD), an agency established by the Hospitaller Order of St. John of God in India.

The aim of the Centre is to promote the well-being and rehabilitation of the Mentally Challenged, creating awareness in society and among families about their obligation towards the Mentally Challenged and train them to live independently and assume their rightful place within this familiar and border society. The Centre is a registered charitable organization for the development of the Mentally Challenged.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: In&Valid
Description:
In&Valid è la prima piattaforma IA innovativa che semplifica l’accesso a informazioni, servizi e opportunità per persone con disabilità e i loro caregivers. 
 Il nostro obiettivo? Offrire un punto di riferimento unico dove utenti e organizzazioni possono connettersi, condividere risorse e accedere a opportunità concrete. 

 Cosa offriamo?
Il nostro portale fornisce supporto in 5 aree chiave:
 Prestazioni pubbliche – Consulenze con professionisti del patronato per accedere a servizi pubblici.
 Iniziative private – Informazioni su attività sportive, sociali e culturali.
 Counseling – Supporto psicologico con professionisti qualificati.
 Formazione – Percorsi di crescita personale e professionale.
 Accesso al lavoro – Strumenti e opportunità per l’inserimento lavorativo.

 Perché seguirci?
Condividiamo news, opportunità, collaborazioni e iniziative per costruire una società più inclusiva. Siamo sempre aperti a partnership con aziende, enti e realtà del terzo settore.

 Unisciti a noi per creare un impatto positivo!

 Scopri di più su www.inevalid.it
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Care I Wish
Description:
Discover exceptional disability support services offered by Care I Wish every day, with clinical expertise and a proactive approach. Our unwavering attention to clinical indicators ensures that we provide quality care by identifying and addressing potential issues before they become critical. Trust us to provide the care you need.


It is our belief that a one-size-fits-all approach should be relegated to the world of clothing, not disability support. We aim to have as many unique approaches to disability support as we have clients. People vary vastly in all sorts of wonderful ways. We are fostering a culture that celebrates the individual and appreciates all those little nuances that really make you who you are.


As a company our goal is quite simple. We want to create an organization that people love working for and provide services that our clients can’t keep quiet about. It’s in everything we do. From the first phone call to the last service we ever provide you, we are always proactively thinking about how we can improve our participants' experience.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Recovery Plus Support
Description: Recovery Plus provides you with a range of NDIS support services. We are adamant about the commitment to finding the right individuals to provide optimal support to our participants and help them on their journey to their best life. We want to elevate the status for support services with this revolutionary approach.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: CuidarSenior - Cuidados Domiciliários
Description:
Pioneiros há 22 anos em cuidados geriátricos, prestamos apoio domiciliário 24h por dia 7 dias por semana. Atendemos às necessidades dos clientes de forma personalizada, próxima e humanizada, garantindo um acompanhamento e supervisão constantes. 

A nossa equipa é constituída por Ajudantes Familiares, Agentes de Geriatria, Técnicos de Enfermagem, Técnicos de Apoio Social e Coordenadores de Cuidados, todos com a mesma missão de proporcionar a melhor qualidade de vida possível a cada um dos nossos clientes, no conforto do seu lar, tratando-os com o respeito e dignidade que merecem, como se fossem membros da nossa família.

Ligue para o 800 181 852 e agende uma avaliação gratuita. Prestamos apoio domiciliário em toda a região da Grande Lisboa.

CUIDADOS FAMILIARES:

Companhia e Convívio, Preparação de Refeições, Tarefas domésticas leves, Transporte, Acompanhamento ao médico e outras saídas, Apoio nas atividades do quotidiano.

CUIDADOS PESSOAIS:

Higiene Pessoal, Auxílio no banho, Posicionamentos e transferências, Lembretes de medicação.

CUIDADOS ESPECIAIS:

Estimulação Cognitiva – Cuidados Interactivos | Programas de acompanhamento de doenças: Crónicas, Degenerativas, Incapacitantes, Oncológicas, Alzheimer, Parkinson | Acompanhamento na deficiência | Recuperação na convalescença e pós-operatório.

CUIDADOS PERMANENTES:

As nossas cuidadoras estão disponíveis dia e noite, em regime interno, disponibilizando um acompanhamento permanente, 24 horas por dia, 7 dias por semana.

SERVIÇOS DE TELEASSISTÊNCIA:

Teleassistência Fixa e Móvel, Vídeo-Cuidados, Monitorização à Distância, Vídeo-Vigilância: assistência e apoio imediato em situações de emergência; indicação de hospitais, clínicas e farmácias de serviço; serviços de alerta; assistência e acompanhamento no lar.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Woonzorggroep GVO
Description:
Woonzorggroep GVO is een woonzorgnetwerk van tien autonome ouderenvoorzieningen verspreid over gans West-Vlaanderen. Zowel in de eigen omgeving als in onze woonzorgcentra kunnen ouderen met een zorgvraag rekenen op onze kennis en expertise.

GVO ondersteunt en begeleidt de voorzieningen in het uitbouwen van hun eigen werking en aanbod. Met een sterk ontwikkelde visie rond zorginnovatie, zorgethiek en dementie willen we op elke vraag een passend antwoord geven. 

De 10 woonzorgcentra die tot Woonzorggroep GVO behoren, zijn: Elisabeth aan Zee (Oostende), Het Laar (Zwevezele), Amphora (Wingene), De Zonnewende (Meulebeke), SAMEN (campus Wakken), SAMEN (campus Tielt), Sint Vincentius (Kortrijk), Sint Jozef (Moorsele), Sint Anna (Bulskamp) en Klaverveld Zedelgem (Zedelgem). Daarnaast is er ook de centrale keuken Mensa (Meulebeke) in samenwerking met Sodexo.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Fullcare Lifetime Pty Ltd
Description: We are NDIS registered firm specialising in disability care and Supported Independent Living (SIL), dedicated to providing exceptional services and support.

Name: We Care Staffing Solutions Pty Ltd
Description:
Established since 2012 in Melbourne, Victoria, We Care Staffing Solutions has expanded their highest measurable standard of care and commitment in home & nursing care. We have branched out to various locations in different states across Eastern Australia – Mildura, Canberra, Wagga Wagga, Young, Cooma, Bathurst, Orange and Central Coast.

Our specialised team are experts in the aged care and disability sector, where they understand the staff requirements, and able to build an environment of mutual respect and encouragement, where team members can learn, develop, and grow.

We can provide Aged Care facilities our team of Registered & Enrolled Nurses, Assistant in Nursing / Personal Care Assistant /Disability Support Workers, Kitchen Hands, Cleaners, Leisure & Lifestyle staff. 

We can also provide Short/Long-Term Contracts, Regional and Remote Nursing, Permanent Recruitment Solutions, Disability, Home and Community Care & Temporary/Emergency Staffing Support.

For jobseekers, we are constantly hiring to provide flexible opportunities for Registered & Enrolled Nurses, Assistant in Nursing / Personal Care Assistant /Disability Support Workers, Kitchen Hands and Cleaners.

We look forward to supporting your future career aspiration and your health care facility by being a part of the ever-growing change to how home care & aged care is delivered. 

Mission: At the heart of all things, the care we deliver would be the highest of priority and great purpose in what we do every day.

Vision: To provide expert, compliant, and continuous improvement in home and nursing care.

Please contact us on 1300 202265 or application@wecarestaffingonline.com.au to discuss current roles or to join our team of professionals today.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Acc-Red
Description:
With 20+ years of experience in transportation and mobility solutions, Acc-Red's Vision is to improve the lives of people, who are currently unable to meet their basic needs and to improve their living conditions by providing mobility assisted solutions and thus help them in leading a dignified life.

It has been providing mobility solutions to the top companies like Voltas, RBI, Tata Zudio, Yulu, Lodha Builders, IDFC First Bank, Indusind Bank, LIC of India, etc.

Understanding the challenges and pain points of our differently abled and senior citizens, we decided to bring our domain expertise and engineering abilities to uniquely craft solutions for them. Compassion, responsibility and safety were the value drivers that helped pave our path to bring innovative solutions for this community. We are committed to making a positive impact on the communities, we serve and the environment we live in.

Name: Seniiors

This includes real-time health monitoring, personalized care plans, and enhanced communication between staff and residents' families. Seniiors focuses on making senior care more transparent, efficient, and connected, ensuring that residents receive the best possible care while keeping their families informed and involved.

Name: Echoing Healthy Ageing
Description: Echoing Healthy Ageing (EHA) is a social enterprise providing consultation, education, and support for people with dementia and their families, and professionals working in geriatric care. Project aims to provide quality of life for person living with dementia which is a progressive, incurable disease.

Name: Emotivi
Description:
Emotivi est la solution pour lutter contre l'isolement affectif chez les seniors ou les personnes seules en perte d'autonomie

Emotivi permet des appels vidéos directement sur le téléviseur du sénior.
Sans connaissance technique. Sans télécommande. Allumage et pilotage des sources automatique.

Envoi de messages, textes et photos par la famille.

Prêt pour la téléconsultation.

Aujourd'hui, plus de 250 personnes en France bénéficient de la qualité des services de Emotivi, avec un Kit installé dans le lieu dans lequel réside la personne âgée isolée. 

Notre solution Emotivi permet implicitement de contribuer au maintien de l'autonomie de la personne âgée, d'apporter un réel soutien et de réduire l'isolement et les éventuels dommages psychologiques.  

Nous tenons également à vous partager quelques chiffres de l'utilisation d'Emotivi à l'échelle nationale en 2022 : 
- 68 000 appels en visio partagés
- 9 000 messages envoyés
 - 1 interaction par jour en moyenne 
- Un appel moyen dure 12 minutes en moyenne
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: CRANK - NO BARRIERS
Description:
CRANK - NO BARRIERS to Community, Independence, Work & Study

Interest based, hybrid coaching that complements therapy and turns NDIS goals into weekly wins.
•	NDIS Registered Provider #4050094476
•	Programs of Support & NDIS ready reporting
•	Hybrid access: online + face to face
•	Evidence informed, interest based approach

Why participants and providers choose CRANK:
We align with therapy goals, provide structured Programs of Support, and deliver concise, NDIS ready progress reports you can rely on for plan reviews.
•	Goal aligned capacity building: social communication, executive functioning (planning, time management, routines), and career readiness
•	Evidence informed & engaging: interest based coaching (incl. gaming & creative tech) to motivate consistent participation
•	Flexible delivery: 1:1, small group, and community sessions—virtual, in person, or hybrid
•	Seamless collaboration: shared plans, regular updates, and clear escalation pathways

CRANK Programs:
•	Social & Community – Build friendships, practice social communication, and participate safely in moderated community activities.
•	Independence & Daily Living – Strengthen routines, planning, organisation, self advocacy and anxiety management strategies.
•	Work & Study – Explore pathways, grow employability and study skills, and complete practical projects with industry mentors.

How CRANK programs work:
1.	Co plan goals with the participant, family and providers
2.	Program of Support scheduled weekly with a mix of 1:1 and group sessions (hybrid options are integrated)
3.	Track & report outcomes aligned to NDIS goals

Funding & alignment (NDIS):
Typically funded under Capacity Building (e.g., Improved Daily Living, Increased Social & Community Participation, Improved Learning). We advise on budget categories during onboarding and provide progress reports to support reviews.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Park Homes (UK) Ltd
Description: Park Homes have been providing care and the very best and homely accommodation since 1996 allowing older people to enjoy a happy and fulfilled life. Those who felt isolated in their own home gain companionship, those who were struggling to cope alone receive 24-hour help, and others who may have felt like they were a burden can find themselves much more independent.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Veramazo Elder Care Concierge
Description:
At Veramazo, we specialize in providing high-quality elder care services that are tailored to meet the unique needs of each individual and their family. We believe in providing an intimate, first class approach to working with our clients when home is no longer an option. Our process is different than everything else out there because we are committed to providing more than just information. Our mission is to be a part of the process with you and your loved ones from start to finish. Our team of Clinical Advisors is made up of licensed and experienced Social Workers who are trained and dedicated to ensuring the highest level of care for our clients. 

We are committed to providing a White Glove experience for all of our clients, and we offer a range of services that include placement, ongoing clinical therapeutic evaluation and patient advocacy, as well as concierge medicine. With flexible scheduling and personalized care plans, we are dedicated to providing the best possible options to our clients. 

When navigating the challenging landscape surrounding elder care in circumstances that are costly, both emotionally and financially, we believe our value lies in helping you make sense of it all. We are agnostic to all facilities and physicians, and we are committed to finding the right fit for our clients. Our hands on, white glove approach is designed to offer you and your loved ones peace of mind, and make an emotionally charged situation more easily digestible. 

By utilizing our "Fit-First" philosophy, you can count on someone being with you every step of the way, in person, as we evaluate your options with you. We are there to provide you the counsel necessary to understand everything in front of you, and our goal is to narrow the options to only what makes the most sense for your unique situation. We want to get it right the first time, every time, and that starts with finding the right fit for you, individually.

At Veramazo, we're here because we care.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Les Papillons Blancs Bourgogne du Sud
Description: Animée par la conviction que chaque individu est unique, l'Association des Papillons Blancs Bourgogne du Sud développe depuis plus de 65 ans des solutions personnalisées d'accompagnement pour les personnes déficientes intellectuelles, autistes ou polyhandicapées, afin que chacun puisse trouver sa place dans la société.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: MemoTag
Description: With MemoTag, caregiving becomes less of a struggle and more of a reassurance. Imagine real-time health insights, instant alerts, and the peace of knowing your loved one is safe—always connected, always cared for. MemoTag is here to bring ease, safety, and a sense of relief to families navigating dementia.

Name: Admire Care Registered NDIS provider
Description:
Admire Care is a registered NDIS service provider in Perth, Australia! The organization is renowned for offering top-notch NDIS-based disability services to participants who seek disabled support and service. Our personalized disability support and care services cater to individuals of all ages and abilities, including children, young adults, elderly adults, and caregivers. We have highly qualified allied health professionals, behavioral support practitioners, therapists, clinical psychologists, accountants, and high-level management expertise. We comprise best-in-class and advanced disabled support equipment that helps our professionals accomplish support and guidance tasks.
Our team supports and assists people with disabilities in achieving all of their goals and focuses on activities the individuals prefer. This includes acquiring new skills, entering the workforce, mastering daily duties and interacting with others in the community. We provide participants with peace of mind by ensuring that they have access to support personnel at all times. Admire Care works closely with allied health professionals, who are passionate and motivated to providing the highest level of supports and services. By providing high-quality, personalised support services centred on the NDIS plan, our professionals assist clients in achieving all of their lifelong goals. It gives individuals complete freedom to live their life as they choose.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Butini
Description:
Bienvenue à Butini, soins d’excellence et confort hôtelier au service des seniors 

Avec quatre établissements aux spécialités distinctes, Butini offre une prise en charge innovante et inclusive, en constante amélioration pour répondre aux besoins des résident·es et de leurs proches
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Fondation Horizons Nouveaux
Description:
Créée en 1996, par Madame Edith Lucie BONGO ONDIMBA, la Fondation Horizons Nouveaux reconnue d’utilité publique selon le Décret N° 000029/PR/MENCF du 16 janvier 1998, s’inscrit dans un projet et des valeurs humanistes qui ont marqué́ les actions de sa fondatrice.

Structure historique, la Fondation Horizons Nouveaux fût le premier établissement à accueillir de jeunes personnes porteuses de handicaps. Cet établissement de référence sur le territoire et dans la sous-région a été un véritable catalyseur de l’action sociale.

Ayant été considéré comme une association sur le plan juridique, la Fondation jouit aujourd’hui pleinement de son statut de Fondation. Cette évolution ne change pas ses valeurs car elle garde toujours sa même vocation qui est l’accompagnement du jeune en situation de handicap afin de l’aider à accéder à une forme d’autonomie. Ce n’est donc pas tant dans ses objectifs, ses missions, qu’il y a un changement mais dans la méthode, les actions à mettre en œuvre. La Fondation se réorganise avec un objectif de modernisation, d’adaptation et d’ajustement de son offre de services. Elle veut proposer un plateau multidimensionnel et varié dans la prise en charge du jeune. Elle veut s’adapter à son temps et être au plus près du jeune accueilli.

Avec une équipe pluridisciplinaire, la Fondation travaille dans la prévention, le dépistage, le diagnostic, l’expertise, la recherche, l’innovation et l’accompagnement médicosocial, éducatif, scolaire et psychopédagogique des enfants présentant une déficience intellectuelle, visuelle et les enfants ayant des troubles du spectre autistique (TSA).
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Hope Circle
Description:
Hope Circle is a registered NDIS provider supporting individuals with complex disabilities, particularly those with forensic histories, mental health, and physical disability.

Since 2019, we've developed a proven, holistic care model based on partnership with a client’s circle of supports.

We pride ourselves on creating individualised care plans that uphold a client's right to live their life, even when complex risks are involved. 

This includes being an implementing provider of behaviour support plans and/or use of regulated restrictive practices, where we have a record of reducing or eliminating a client’s restrictive practices.

We currently provide services in Adelaide and Perth.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Handi Val de Seine
Description:
L'association Handi Val de Seine a été fondée il y a plus de 50 ans par le syndicat intercommunal éponyme pour apporter des solutions d'accompagnement aux personnes porteuses de handicap et à leurs familles sur notre territoire. 

Aujourd'hui, nous comptons 22 établissements et services qui accompagnent ces personnes tout au long du parcours de vie, du diagnostic précoce chez le nourrisson à la personne handicapée vieillissante polyhandicapée en passant par la prévention, la scolarisation en école inclusive, des approches éducatives spécifiques, une rééducation adaptée, l'orientation vers l'emploi, l'hébergement en établissement, l'autonomie à domicile mais aussi la lutte contre l'isolement... 

- Plus de 1500 personnes accompagnées
- Plus de 490 professionnels
- 22 établissements et services spécialisés dans l'accompagnement des personnes en situation de handicap

NOTRE VOLONTE
Aider la personne accompagnée à vivre dans la dignité et à faire valoir ses droits, en tenant compte de ses aspirations.

NOTRE ASPIRATION
Changer le regard sur le handicap et sur la différence.

Promouvoir l'autonomie en lien avec les professionnels et les familles :
- Reconnaître leur place dans la société
- Favoriser l'accès à leurs droits et à leurs aspirations
- Respecter les projets de vie de chaque personne
- Faciliter leur vie quotidienne
- Fédérer les partenariats des acteurs médico-sociaux, sociaux et de santé
- Créer une dynamique pour la réalisation de projets communs co-construits
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Fondation Eben-Hézer - Pôle Grand Age
Description:
Résultat de la fusion par absorption, en 2022, de la Fondation Beau-Site au sein de la Fondation Eben-Hézer, le Pôle Grand Age est la mutualisation de compétences et de savoir-faire dans le domaine du grand âge.

En renforçant le pôle de gériatrie de la Fondation Eben-Hézer, exploité jusqu’alors par l’EMS Home Salem, il permet de développer une offre de prestations globales, plus complète et transversale, de manière ciblée, décentralisée, tout en gardant une proximité régionale.

Le Pôle Grand Age propose ainsi une réponse dynamique et innovante face aux demandes, aux besoins de la génération vieillissante désireuse de pouvoir continuer à vivre de la manière la plus autonome possible, malgré les fragilités liées à l'âge, et à maintenir son réseau relationnel, tout en bénéficiant de l'assistance nécessaire, en fonction de leur autodétermination et de leur autonomie.

Cette capacité d’anticipation du Pôle Grand Age à répondre aux demandes actuelles et aux besoins futurs des aîné.e.s, est réalisable grâce à la qualité de ses professionnels et à ses nombreuses prestations adaptées et ciblées.

Au niveau architectural, le Pôle Grand Age, se compose de :
5 EMS
3 Centres d’Accueil Temporaire 
D’appartements protégés 
De cuisines de production

L’offre de prestations du Pôle Grand Age, se décline en :
Prestations d’hébergement 
Prestations de soutien aux ainé.e.s à domicile
Prestation de soutien aux proches aidants
Prestations de développement du savoir
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: ZZWD | Zorgcollectief Zuidwest-Drenthe
Description:
Wij realiseren een fijne (oude) dag voor onze cliënten door middel van kwalitatief goede, veilige en persoonsgerichte zorg en welzijn met ruimte voor professionele ontwikkeling en persoonlijke groei voor onze medewerkers.

Wij leveren verschillende diensten op het terrein van wonen, welzijn en zorg voor met name ouderen in de regio Zuidwest-Drenthe zoals thuiszorg, wonen met zorg, hulp bij het huishouden, activiteiten en maaltijdservice thuis. Hierbij is ons uitgangspunt, dat onze ondersteuning moet bijdragen aan de kwaliteit van leven van de cliënt. De wensen en behoeften van de cliënt vormen het vertrekpunt voor ons handelen.

In Diever, Dwingeloo, Ruinen en Havelte biedt ZZWD wonen met 24-uurs zorg. In deze dorpen (m.u.v. Diever) heeft ZZWD, bijvoorbeeld na een ziekenhuisopname, de mogelijkheid om tijdelijk te verblijven in een van onze gastenverblijven.
Komt u gerust eens langs in een van de locaties, u bent van harte welkom!
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Mutual Care NSW Registered NDIS Provider
Description: Regsitered Service Provider specialises in Plan managment .
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: CRANK - No Barriers
Description:
BREAKING BIG BIG BARRIERS

Where a love of gaming connects us. Where our community of shared interests is built and passions create career opportunity

Coaching tailored to individual goals - We help those who want to build connections and capabilities to achieve career, study, community participation and independent living goals. We specialise in helping people with Autism spectrum disorder (ASD), psychosocial and other barriers and can tailor solutions to help anyone 12+ in a fun and supported way.

Social, Career and SLES Coaching Programs - Our eSports and foundational programs help people at the start of their journey to explore opportunities and build life transforming capabilities and confidence.

Our program involves group and 1:1 coaching, free play sessions, fun gaming experiences and industry events. Engaged via the gaming themes, our participants evolve capabilities to help them achieve study, career, independent living, and community participation goals. Funding comes from Core, Finding and Keeping a Job (FAKAJ), School Leaver Employment Supports (SLES) and other Capacity Building budgets.

STA Holiday Programs - Our Holiday Programs immerse participants in the best of Melbourne’s gaming community with experiences designed to build skills, confidence and new friends while giving family and carers much needed respite. Holiday programs run for 5-7 days and are designed to complement our other programs and experiences. Funding comes from NDIS Core, Short Term Accommodation (STA) and Capacity Building budgets.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Demeure Heka
Description:
Nous développons un concept d’habitat inclusif/partagé à destination de nos aînés et adapté au territoire dont l’objectif est de permettre à plusieurs séniors de cohabiter en toute autonomie et sécurité dans un cadre de vie serein et à taille humaine.

En effet, Demeure HEKA, société implantée à Villefranche Sur Saône, réalise un habitat nouvelle génération pour nos ainés autonomes ou en perte d’autonomie grâce à une solution alternative d’habitat inclusif lorsque le maintien à domicile n’est plus possible et que l'hébergement en EHPAD n'est pas nécessaire ou non souhaité.

Porté et réglementé par la loi ELAN, notre concept est celui d’une ou deux maisons, chacune composée de 8 à 10 espaces privatifs articulés autour d’espaces communs animés par un(e) maitre(sse) de maison domicilié(e) sur place et accompagné(e) par des auxiliaires de vie. Ces lieux de vie partagés et animés peuvent également s'inscrire en rez-de-chaussée de bâtiments collectifs. Cet habitat à taille humaine (entre 10 et 24 résidents selon les configurations) répond pleinement à une attente forte formulée aussi bien par nos ainés, qui souhaitent disposer d’un « chez soi » sans être seuls et isolés, par les aidants (conjoints, enfants, amis…) ayant besoin de soutien et de moments de répit, que par les équipes de professionnels (auxiliaires de vie, aide-soignants…) désirant retrouver notamment un cadre de travail plus apaisé et proche de leurs domiciles.

Ce concept séduit particulièrement les collectivités car il apporte une solution aux administrés et créé un écosystème responsable dans un esprit engagé et vertueux engendrant un mécanisme de dynamisation notamment par la création d’emploi, l’usage des circuits-courts et l’animation associative. Il permet également d’améliorer et de diversifier la capacité d’accueil des habitants en minimisant l’artificialisation des sols.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Incluso Services

Name: Les Éligibles et leurs Aidants
Description:
Nous sommes des personnes qui se sentent concernées par la loi sur l’aide à mourir : en situation de handicap et/ou malades, âgées, dépendantes, mais aussi proches-aidantes, soignantes, citoyennes — en marge de toute confession et appartenance politique.

Nous partageons une même réalité : celle d’avoir été, un jour, qualifiés « d’éligibles » à l’aide à mourir, ou celle de savoir qu’à plus ou moins long terme, nous le serons.

Nous sommes tous des Éligibles car cette loi porte en elle un projet de société que nous refusons.

Nous avons décidé de prendre la parole ensemble. Non pas pour juger les choix individuels, mais pour refuser une société qui légalise l’abandon.

Notre collectif est né en 2025, dans l’urgence, à la suite de l'appel de Magali et Cyril Jeanteur . Nous portons une vision de long terme : celle d’une société où la vie reste un droit, même vulnérable.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: myUDAAN
Description:
myUDAAN is a Technology Driven Social Impact startup solving PEOPLE MOBILITY problems especially for Disabled, Elderly, Bedridden, expecting mothers & temporarily disabled.

myUDAAN through its single Epicenter App Provides people to book Assistants for Mobility, check accessible locations for convenient mobility, buy specialized Mobility products, Earn livelihood.

myUDAAN is a part of India's prominent Social Impact Accelerator program, AISEA. The program is promoted by DsT through the NIDHI Accelerator program and is jointly setup by i-TIC Foundation, IIT Hyderabad and Action for India.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: 24CARE Australia
Description:
24Care Australia is a disability support and services provider in ACT, VICTORIA , QLD AND NSW. We are a value based and service-oriented organization.

24Care Australia is an organization that was established with the sole aim of offering disability support and Services 7 days a week, 24 hours a day that puts the participant as a priority in promoting independence and progression in a safe and non-discriminative environment.

At 24Care Australia we provide a range of disability services. With the range of services we provide, we aim to make a difference in the lives of those with disability. The goal is to make each of our participant’s lives easier, fairer and more involved in their own communities.

Home Care
Our  Support Worker and care staff are experienced and trained to handle full range of services on a live-in or live-out basis, temporarily or long term to suit your needs and circumstances. Our service include but not limited to;

Assistance with daily personal activities
Assistance with travel/transport arrangements
Community nursing care for high care needs
Development of daily living and life skills (Co-Ordination of supports/Case management)
Household tasks
Co- Ordination of Supports: 

Help with connecting with providers of supports so that your goals and expectations are met.
Depending on your needs and budget, we can be as hands on as you require.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Gouwe Ouwe – vanuit Stichting De Tijdmachine
Description:
Gouwe Ouwe is een initiatief van 𝗦𝘁𝗶𝗰𝗵𝘁𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗗𝗲 𝗧𝗶𝗷𝗱𝗺𝗮𝗰𝗵𝗶𝗻𝗲 . Vergrijzen op eigen wijze, daar draait het bij ons om! Met een bewezen aanpak, aandacht en plezier dragen onze projecten bij aan het (structureel) verbeteren van de kwaliteit van leven van ouderen – of je nu zelfstandig woont of in een verpleeg- of verzorgingshuis. Want iedereen verdient het om op zijn of haar eigen manier oud te worden. Waardig, respectvol en met zelfregie.

Uit onze vele gesprekken met ouderen kwam één behoefte wel heel sterk naar voren: livemuziek. Iets meer rock & roll in het leven, gewoon net zoals vroeger in de kroeg of dancing, Gouwe Ouwe was geboren. Fantastische middagen en avonden in de sfeer van toen waarbij niet zelden het dak eraf gaat, maar wat ook zoveel meer is dan een leuk feestje. Of je nu ongedwongen nieuwe mensen wilt ontmoeten, even lekker met die voetjes van de vloer wilt, herinneringen wilt ophalen onder het genot van ouderwets lekkere hapjes en drankjes, óf gewoon wilt zitten, kijken en genieten – iedereen is welkom en hoort erbij.

En 𝘦𝘯 𝘱𝘢𝘴𝘴𝘢𝘯𝘵 krijg je een beter beeld van wat er allemaal georganiseerd wordt in de wijk. Tijdens elke editie zijn organisaties en lokale partijen aanwezig die zich inzetten voor ouderenwelzijn. Mooie initiatieven waar je wellicht nog geen weet van had! Reken dus niet alleen op meer binding met elkaar, maar ook met de buurt. Lekker laagdrempelig, waarbij niets moet en alles mag.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Centro Papa Giovanni XXIII
Description:
Il Centro Papa Giovanni XXIII è una Società Cooperativa Sociale (Onlus) fondata nel 1997.
La nostra Mission è la seguente:
"Inclusione, Dignità e Autonomia: la Persona al Centro!
La disabilità è una sfida. Implica impegno, fiducia, tenacia e una buona dose di ottimismo. Tutti i giorni noi raccogliamo questa sfida perché crediamo in un’inclusione possibile.
Desideriamo una società civile nella quale nessuno debba essere escluso ma tutti debbano avere la possibilità di realizzare sé stessi al massimo delle proprie potenzialità.
Con i nostri servizi mettiamo al centro le necessità ed i sogni delle persone con disabilità impegnandoci a difendere il rispetto, la dignità, il diritto alla felicità e l’autonomia.
Sogniamo un mondo senza barriere culturali, sociali e architettoniche per le persone con disabilità.
Il nostro approccio educativo verso le persone con disabilità vede i nostri Operatori ed Operatrici come “traghettatori” dei desideri, della volontà e dei sogni delle persone che ci sono state affidate. È la persona stessa che sceglie".

Con due Centri Diurni, due Comunità Residenziali e “Casa Sollievo”, un appartamento di pronta accoglienza per persone disabili, il  Centro Papa Giovanni XXIII si impegna quotidianamente a promuovere il rispetto, la dignità, il diritto all’autonomia e alla felicità delle persone disabili.

Gestiamo due Centri Diurni, due Comunità Residenziali e “Casa Sollievo”, un appartamento di pronta accoglienza per persone disabili. Fra i numero progetti, le Bomboniere Solidali realizzate a mano e con il cuore dai nostri ospiti, e Fricchiò (www.fricchio.it), la nostra Ristorazione Solidale a base di inclusione sociale e lavorativa che vede assunte persone con disabilità.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Horizon Community Services
Description:
Horizon Community Services was established to provide individuals with special needs, as well as their friends and relatives, with a more convenient approach to obtain individualised disability care. For persons living with disabilities, we offer a wide range of personalised, flexible, and high-quality disability services and support coordinated based on their preferences and requirements. Our headquarters are in Brisbane, Queensland.
We have vast disability care expertise and specialise in customising all levels of support to ensure that our participants achieve their objectives. Our dependable management team and support staff actively motivate and cooperate with our participants to help them live more self-sufficient and meaningful lives.

Horizon Community Services adheres to the safe and quality standards of the NDIS in order to give you the best possible care!

Horizon Community Services places a premium on providing care that is totally tailored to each client. We value each individual as the unique individual that they are, which is why we shun "one size fits all" solutions. Our care plans are person-centred , which means you will receive a service that identifies your needs and provides a solution. 

Our Services are:

Assistance with Daily Activities
Community Access
Personal Care & Support
In-home Support
Complex Care
Supported Independent Living (SIL)
Short Term Accommodation (STA)
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Senior Care Authority | Central Ohio East
Description:
Senior Care Authority in Central Ohio acts as a vital resource for families navigating the landscape of elder care. Our core mission is to alleviate the stress and complexity associated with finding appropriate care solutions for aging loved ones, ensuring seniors receive the dignified and safe support they need.

The primary service offered by Senior Care Authority is personalized senior placement assistance. This goes far beyond simply providing a list of facilities. Our local advisors in Central Ohio conduct a thorough assessment of a senior's current and future care needs, personal preferences, geographical requirements, and budget. With this comprehensive understanding, we then identify and vet suitable options, which can include independent living, assisted living, memory care, or skilled nursing facilities, as well as smaller residential care homes. Senior Care Authority advisors take the time to personally visit these locations, meet staff and residents, and review state inspection reports to ensure quality and compliance. They then accompany families on tours, help formulate pertinent questions, and even assist with paperwork and negotiations, providing guidance and advocacy every step of the way. This hands-on approach ensures families make informed decisions tailored to their unique circumstances, with total transparency regarding any potential fees. The service is typically no cost to families, as Senior Care Authority is paid a referral fee by the communities and care homes.

Beyond placement, Senior Care Authority also offers invaluable elder care consulting. This service helps families navigate complex transitions, endless decision-making, and the intricacies of the healthcare system. This can encompass a wide range of support, such as facilitating crucial conversations among family members, assisting with finding reliable in-home care agencies or caregivers, addressing challenges related to long-distance caregiving,
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Building Bridges Network Australia
Description:
Building Bridges Informative Networking is a grassroots initiative built on collaboration, connection, and shared learning within the disability and community services sector.

Co-founded by Howard Law (Global Rehabilitation Service), Ivania Choi (Care2U Community Services), Emanuel Gini (Ability Connect) and Earl Schonberger (Only Care & Connect Care Australia) our goal is simple — to create a space where providers, professionals, and lived experience voices can come together to have real conversations that lead to real change.

Through monthly networking events, we spotlight emerging issues, policy shifts, and frontline challenges in the NDIS and broader support landscape. Our panel discussions are led by thought leaders across support coordination, allied health, plan management, legal advocacy, housing, and more.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Accesame (ESUS)
Description:
Chez Accesame, nous sommes convaincus que la meilleure façon de préserver son indépendance, c’est d’anticiper.

Si chaque personne âgée s’engage dans cette démarche en adaptant son lieu de vie au plus tôt, il devient plus facile de maintenir son autonomie et de vivre chez soi dans de bonnes conditions, et pour longtemps.

Depuis 2016, Accesame s'efforce de donner à chacun et chacune les possibilités et l’élan nécessaires pour envisager le vieillissement sous un regard différent, plus serein.

Nous allons à la rencontre des personnes âgées directement à leur domicile pour les aider à prendre conscience des enjeux, les informer, et les accompagner dans leurs projets d’adaptation, afin qu’elles puissent mieux se projeter dans un habitat et un environnement sécurisés et adaptés à leurs besoins futurs.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Karla Plattform GmbH
Description:
Ein Lebensabend zu Hause, im vertrauten Umfeld und gemeinsam mit den Liebsten – das wünschen sich wohl die meisten älteren Menschen. Wären da nicht diese vielen kleinen und größeren Dinge, die im Alltag erledigt werden müssen: der Haushalt zum Beispiel, die Gartenarbeit oder auch die Pflege.

Geben Sie auf hallokarla.de ein, aus welchem Bereich und wann Ihr Alltagshelfer kommen soll. Schon werden Ihnen passende Vorschläge unserer Partnerunternehmen gemacht. Dann nur noch auswählen, buchen und schon steht Ihre helfende Hand vor Ihrer Tür.

Karla ist Teil der Sparkassen-Finanzgruppe. Das garantiert Ihnen Zuverlässigkeit, Transparenz und Fairness im Miteinander. Für Ihr Glück der späten Jahre.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Prométhée 41 Cap Emploi 41
Description:
Prométhée 41 a été créée en 1995. 
Elle développe en permanence, depuis le début, des actions tournées vers les entreprises et les personnes en situation de handicap.
Elle est financée par l’AGEFIPH, Pôle Emploi et le FIPHFP. 



NOS ATOUTS
Notre équipe apporte:
- Une expérience de plus de 25 ans sur le champ du handicap et du travail.
- Une présence active sur le département et une connaissance des bassins d’emploi.
- Une expertise sur les différents types de handicap.
- Un conseil d’administration composé de chefs d’entreprises très impliqués.


NOTRE MÉTIER
Insérer en entreprise ou maintenir en emploi des personnes avec une problématique de santé.
Nous nous adressons à:
- Toute personne en situation de handicapavec une problématique de santé.
- Toute entreprise souhaitant recruter ou maintenir un collaborateur ayant une problématique de santé ou en situation de handicap.



NOTRE ÉQUIPE
1 équipe pluridisciplinaire de 21 collaborateurs:
psychologues du travail, ergonomes et chargés de mission spécialisés dans le recrutement.

Name: SDA Australia Group
Description:
SDA Australia Group sources and facilitates Specialist Disability Accommodation for the National Disability Insurance Scheme (NDIS).

Our homes, villas and apartments are all built according with the NDIS Specialist Disability Accommodation (SDA) Design Standards.

All accommodation categories constructed meet the NDIS SDA Design Standards Platinum or Silver Standard as a minimum. Each dwelling is tailored to meet required levels of accessibility and support across the spectrum of High Physical Support, Fully Accessible, Improved Liveability and Robust.

Our paramount focus is to match clients with accommodation that best supports their lifestyles.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Circle Of Hope
Description:
Circle of Hope is an approved registered provider under the National Disability Insurance Scheme (NDIS). We provide quality and safe support services in the South-west Sydney and Newcastle region. 

We partner with you to help you understand and navigate your way through your NDIS plan and provide supports and services to meet your needs, goals and preferences in line with your plan.  Our aim is to help you achieve your goals and realise your full potential. 

At Circle of Hope we work hard to build independence, increase opportunities and social participation for people living with disability in Australia.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: SKOOT Community Access
Description:
Welcome to SKOOT Community Access, where we redefine transportation with a focus on three core principles: Cost-Efficient Flexibility, Empowering Independence, and Adaptable Solutions.

Cost-Efficient Flexibility: Experience the unparalleled freedom of flexible supports with no minimum shift time, allowing you to maximise the value of your NDIS plan. At SKOOT Community Access, we believe in putting you in control of your day and your budget, ensuring that every journey fits seamlessly into your lifestyle.

Empowering Independence: Say goodbye to the limitations of informal support, fixed bus routes, and rigid schedules. Our service is designed to empower you by offering flexibility and independence, enabling personalised and convenient journeys tailored to your needs and preferences.

Adaptable Solutions: We understand that every passenger is unique, which is why we take a flexible approach to transportation. Our service seamlessly adjusts to diverse needs, ensuring that each journey is personalised and empowering. With SKOOT Community Access, you can trust that you'll always receive the adaptable solutions you deserve.

Embark on a journey of freedom, empowerment, and convenience with SKOOT Community Access. Join us and experience transportation reimagined.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Acpei
Description:
L'Acpei (Association Châlonnaise de Parents Et amis de personnes déficientes Intellectuelles et/ou autistes) gère 15 établissements ou services permettant d’accueillir environ 480 enfants et adultes handicapés et emploie plus de 320 professionnels.

L’Acpei est affiliée au niveau national à l’Unapei qui regroupe environ 750 associations qui gèrent 2900 établissements accueillant 180 000 personnes.

Elle est aussi partenaire d’Autisme France.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Association Nous Aussi
Description:
L’Association « NOUS AUSSI » est créée en 1959 par des parents d’enfants déficients intellectuels du nord de la Haute-Savoie et du Pays de Gex afin d’ouvrir une école pour leurs enfants.
L’Association a pour objectifs de défendre les intérêts moraux et matériels des familles de personnes handicapées et d’apporter par tous les moyens, éducation, aide, secours, assistance et protection aux enfants, adolescents et adultes présentant une déficience ou une inadaptation physique, morale ou intellectuelle qui ne leur permet pas de mener l’existence normale d’une personne de leur âge.
Le but principal de l’Association « NOUS AUSSI » est de permettre à des personnes déficientes intellectuelles de suivre une éducation adaptée, d’organiser une formation professionnelle puis d’accéder au statut de travailleur afin de mener une existence la plus normale possible au sein d’établissements socio-éducatifs.
Depuis 1959, l'association développe des dispositifs au fur et à mesure qu'apparait le besoin. Autour d'un IME, l'association a développé un SESSAD pour l'ouverture vers le milieu ordinaire, un ESAT pour ses travailleurs, des foyers d'hébergement pour les loger ou pour les personnes ne pouvant pas travailler. Aujourd'hui le développement s'ouvre vers nos vieillissants ou sur des services d'inclusion type DAR.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Fundación Red ELEAM
Description: Red ELEAM es una fundación que apoya a hogares o Establecimientos de Larga Estadía para Adultos Mayores (ELEAM), articulando y ejecutando en conjunto con terceros, iniciativas que promuevan el envejecimiento positivo y el bienestar integral de las personas mayores que ahí residen, especialmente de las más vulnerables.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: Tricentenaire Groupe
Description:
Le Tricentenaire assure,
en collaboration avec les personnes elles-mêmes et leurs familles, les organismes œuvrant dans le domaine du handicap et ses Ministères de tutelle,
et ce, dans le cadre d’un projet éducatif de type socio-pédagogique fondé sur un concept d’approche globale centré sur la personne dans sa dignité humaine et la qualité de vie,
l’accueil et l’assistance humaine dans la gestion du quotidien de personnes en situation de handicap, notamment par l’hébergement, l’activité en centre de jour spécialisé, la coordination et la prestation d’aides et de soins, le soutien psychosocial et thérapeutique, la formation et le travail, le sport et l’animation des loisirs, ainsi que l’intégration sociale. 

Une vision claire :
Améliorer la qualité de vie des usagers et de leurs familles

Des valeurs simples :
Autodétermination et inter-responsabilité dans le respect de la dignité humaine

Des temps forts :
Accueil - Accompagnement au Quotidien - Services - Intégration

Name: AgeWell Advocacy LLC
Description:
Welcome! I'm Travis Friot, the Founder and Elder Advocate of AgeWell Advocacy. AgeWell Advocacy is a geriatric care management service that really started when I was 13. I volunteered in the first Eden Alternative nursing home and from there I knew that I wanted to support elders and people that care for them. 

Throughout my career, I realized that caregivers need more support and elders can often have a better quality of life with the right advocate.

Struggling to care for an aging parent or loved one? Looking for solutions to your own aging challenges? You’re not alone.

Caring for an older loved one, or navigating your own challenges with aging, can be overwhelming, confusing, and isolating. You’re trying to make the best decisions, but there’s no roadmap.

That’s where I come in. I help caregivers and aging adults, aged 55+, across the U.S. make clear, confident decisions about care, housing, health, and wellness—from the comfort of home.

Through phone and video consultations, get expert support with:
• dementia care guidance
• healthcare navigation
• senior living consulting
• care coordination
• reducing caregiver stress
• helping elders to live in their preferred home
• & more
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Dat komt door ons nieuwe concept waarmee wij onze mensen veel administratief werk uit handen nemen. Zo kunnen zijn zich richten op hun echte passie: het verlenen van passende thuis- en ouderenzorg.

Description:

Name: SafeLane Healthcare

"Our goal is to deliver top-class care services for everyone who needs support to find joy in their life. Our values centre around our staff, participants, and their families."

At the heart of our mission lies a simple yet profound belief: every individual, regardless of their abilities, deserves happiness and independence. With unwavering dedication, we are turning this belief into a reality by offering accessible healthcare, personalized solutions, and becoming a powerful voice for the disabled community.

"Personalized Care for All" — We stand out for our unwavering commitment to personalized care. Our dedicated team tailors healthcare plans to meet the unique needs of each individual. We take into account factors such as age and gender to ensure that every person receives the specialized care they require.

"More Than Healthcare: It's a Community" — We transcend the role of a mere healthcare provider; we are a thriving community. We offer a wide range of support services designed to cater to unique needs. Whether it's assistance with daily tasks or helping individuals acquire new skills, our professional staff is trained to provide the best care possible.

"Values at the Heart of Care" — Respect, privacy, honesty, safety, and passion are not empty buzzwords here; they are the guiding principles that inform every aspect of the care and support we provide.

Name: ByStorm Beauty

ByStorm was born from the belief that beauty belongs to everyone—it's a right, a feeling, and a celebration that everyone should have access to. That is why we designed our makeup accessories to attach to existing cosmetics to make them easier to open, hold, and apply.  Launching in June 2024, our accessories effortlessly integrate with the products you adore because to us, true inclusivity means everyone gets to use the same products.
We’re convinced that beauty shouldn't be crafted in boardrooms but co-created with the authentic voices of people like YOU.  With ByStorm, we're carving out a space where every voice is heard, and every story matters.  We live for that moment when you get yourself ready and just feel unapologetically like you, ready to take the world - ByStorm.
We are setting a new beauty standard - celebrating the beauty that is as unique, bold, and fabulous as you are.. Welcome to the ByStorm revolution!

Nasce dalla volontà di imprenditori attivi sul mercato di riferimento a tutti i livelli della filiera, dalla produzione alla vendita al dettaglio, in Italia e all’estero. Nonostante la sua recente costituzione, HCS porta con sé decenni di esperienza nella progettazione, produzione e commercializzazione di ausili per la riabilitazione di varia natura.

Attualmente l’azienda è costituita da 2 Divisioni:

Sovrana: specializzata nella vendita diretta a domicilio di prodotti e soluzioni per il benessere quali sollevatori, letti ortopedici, montascale, poltrone elevabili, scooter elettrici, etc.. Insieme al prodotto fornisce una serie di servizi aggiuntivi e correlati (il consulente a domicilio, la prova del prodotto a domicilio, la consegna e l’installazione a domicilio, un servizio post vendita accurato etc ), che rappresentano da sempre il vero valore aggiunto. Svolge la sua attività commerciale grazie ad uno staff interno composto da 14 persone tra dipendenti e collaboratori e una rete tecnica formata da 12 aziende specializzate nella manutenzione elettronica, meccanica ed idraulica.

Reha: specializzata nelle gare d’appalto per Enti Pubblici e Privati, eroga servizi di sanificazione, ricondizionamento, fornitura e noleggio di ausili e sistemi antidecubito su tutto il territorio nazionale grazie ad una capillare organizzazione logistica. Si rivolge alle Aziende Sanitarie Locali, alle strutture Ospedaliere, alle Case di riposo pubbliche e private con servizi ad alto valore aggiunto. Attualmente è composta da un organico di 90 persone circa, tra dipendenti e collaboratori esterni. Un vero punto di forza è rappresentato dalla gestione informatizzata di tutte le suindicate attività; il software di proprietà, creato appositamente e sviluppato negli anni, ha contribuito a rendere il servizio altamente qualitativo.

Name: Association Mon Petit Guerrier Sourire
Description:
Cette association a pour objet de :
-  Faire connaitre le syndrome de GLASS qui est une maladie génétique rare, afin que cette maladie puisse être détectée et prise en charge dès la naissance.
- Proposer diverses manifestations et vente de produits dans le but de récolter des fonds pour subvenir aux besoins de Maélo qui est atteint par ce syndrome et lui acheter du matériel adapté.
- Aider la recherche médicale pour que le plus grand nombre de personnes atteintes puissent bénéficier de soins adaptés.
- Développer l’usage du Makaton auprès du grand public afin de réduire l’isolement des personnes en situation de handicap et favoriser leur accès à la communication.

Le Syndrome de GLASS en quelques chiffres :
- Maladie connue depuis seulement 2015
- Protocole national de soins établi en 2021
- 85 cas répertoriés en France
- 750 cas répertoriés dans le Monde
- 0 traitements existants à ce jour.

Le syndrome de GLASS c'est quoi ? C'est le syndrome associé à SATB2 (SATB2-associated syndrome ; SAS; Glass syndrome, MIM# 612313). C'est une maladie génétique rare dont la prévalence est inconnue. Il est dû à une altération du gène SATB2 liée soit à un microremaniement de la région 2q33.1 soit à une variation intragénique pathogène. Le mode d’hérédité est autosomique dominant. Il s’agit dans la majorité des cas d’une délétion ou d’une variation de novo. 

En langage courant, cela veut dire que chez les personnes touchées par ce syndrome, il manque un minuscule, microscopique morceau de ce gêne SATB2 qui est situé dans le chromosome 2, et que dans la plupart des cas, cela n'est pas héréditaire, mais dû à une malformation chromosomique au moment où la chaîne ADN se crée.

Name: Itaca cooperativa sociale
Description:
Itaca è una cooperativa sociale che da anni opera nei comuni della Bassa Bergamasca per offrire servizi per persone con disabilità, disagio mentale, minori, giovani, anziani e comunità.
E' una realtà sociale ed economica capace di comprendere i bisogni delle persone e offrire loro soluzioni competenti ed efficienti, organizzate in filiere di servizi, in grado di progettare interventi ad hoc per ciascuna situazione. Ogni giorno apre i suoi servizi a oltre 350 persone, in tutto l’anno sono oltre 2000.
Le attività sono garantite da un gruppo di 170 professionisti 
Le nostre filiere:
- dei servizi diurni e residenziali per le persone disabili e le loro famiglie, che offre interventi che coprono tutto l’arco della vita delle persone e risponde ai differenti livelli di gravità;
- dei servizi residenziali per persone con disagio mentale, che comprende risposte abitative con diversi livelli di protezione;
- dei servizi territoriali e domiciliari per minori, giovani e anziani in situazione di fragilità e non autosufficienza.
I servizi sono in regime di accreditamento e contrattualizzazione con gli enti pubblici: Regione Lombardia, Azienda di Tutela della Salute (ATS), Amministrazioni Comunali, Aziende Speciali Territoriali. Si sono specializzati nella cura delle persone con fragilità psichica e disabilità grave e gravissima, attraverso esperienze e attività educative, assistenziali, socio-riabilitative, relazionali, creative. In particolare intendono offrire alle persone con fragilità un’esperienza di benessere all’interno di un contesto in cui possa costantemente confrontarsi con dimensioni esistenziali e cicliche del percorso di vita. Promuovono l'inclusione sociale in spazi in cui l’individuo possa costantemente sperimentarsi nel giocare competenze/identità sociali e e possibilità che altrimenti e altrove non troverebbe.
Sviluppano un progetto individualizzato per ciascuno degli ospiti, riconoscendo le famiglie e il territorio come partner nella relazione di cura

Name: Prairie Strides, Inc.
Description:
Prairie Strides is an adaptive horse riding program for children, living with disabilities, in and around Winnipeg. Riding sessions are conducted by trained accessible riding instructors in conjunction with physiotherapists, speech language pathologists and occupational therapists.

There are two sessions (spring and fall) each year consisting of 10 weeks each session. We have over 80 volunteers who attend a minimum of one class per week and include a leader for each horse, two sidewalkers for each rider, barn and arena help, activity leaders, greeters, certified instructors and therapists. There are also a number of our valuable spares who fill in on very short notice and keep the program running.

Prairie Strides is a Charitable Organization.

Less than 15% of the cost is covered by the riding fees. We rely on fundraising and donations to meet the remainder of the expenses so that we may continue to exist and provide this unique therapy for children with varying abilities.

Formed in 1977 to provide an accessible riding program for children with a variety of abilities, Prairie Strides (formerly The Manitoba Riding for the Disabled Association) is able to provide therapeutic riding for children 5 to 15 years of age. Prairie Strides is run by a volunteer Board of Directors and one office staff.

Accessible riding can help children with diagnosis such as:
Cerebral Palsy, Visual Impairment, Autism and other developmental challenges.

Riding helps by providing stimulus by creating a unique therapeutic and social environment. As the horse is walking, the motion imparted to the rider is similar to normal human walking, gently mobilizing the joints.

Physical Benefit: Riding can improve balance and coordination, strengthen muscles, increase circulation and decrease spasticity.

Psychological Benefit: Riding presents participants with a challenge and gives them a sense of achievement with every task completed.

Name: EPAS 65 - EHPAD, Foyer de Vie, Foyer d'Hébergement, ESAT, EA, SAVS, SAMSAH, SMP
Description:
L’Établissement Public d’Accompagnement et de Soins (EPAS 65) est un établissement médico-social public (Fonction Publique Hospitalière). Il a pour mission l'accompagnement des personnes en situation de handicap et des personnes âgées dépendantes, des travailleurs handicapés et des majeurs protégés. 
L'EPAS 65 est né en janvier 2017 de la fusion de trois établissements médico-sociaux rayonnant sur l’ensemble du département des Hautes-Pyrénées. 
L’établissement est organisé en 3 pôles d'activités : pôle travail, pôle hébergement et pôle domicile. Son siège social se situe à Castelnau-Rivière-Basse.
L'EPAS 65 vient répondre à 8 missions différentes d’accompagnement des usagers (ESAT, EHPAD, FH, FV, SAVS, SMP, EA, SAMSAH), sur 7 communes (Castelnau-Rivière-Basse, Vic-en-Bigorre, Séméac, Tarbes, Juillan, Lannemezan, Sarp), en8 implantations et 10 sites géographiques. 
Ses valeurs sur lesquelles son action est fondée s'expriment ainsi :
• accompagner chaque personne accueillie dans sa singularité, sans discrimination ni jugement au regard des missions qui lui sont confiées : « accueillir et accompagner des personnes en situation de vulnérabilité liée au handicap et/ou au vieillissement afin de prévenir la dépendance en agissant sur les facteurs de fragilisation et en favorisant l’autonomie » ;
• respecter les droits et libertés de chacun et soutenir l’accès aux droits des personnes accompagnées ;
• affirmer l’égalité de droit pour chacun et l’équité dans l’accompagnement.
Primary Industry: Services for the Elderly and Disabled

Name: La Bulle de Jade
Description:
La Bulle de Jade | Espace de Répit et d'Accueil pour les Enfants en Situation de Handicap et leurs Familles

La Bulle de Jade est une association née pour offrir soutien, répit et espoir aux familles d’enfants en situation de handicap. Inspirée par Jade, une petite fille lumineuse atteinte du syndrome de Lennox-Gastaut, non verbale et reconnue handicapée à plus de 80%, La Bulle de Jade incarne la résilience et la bienveillance. Nous créons des solutions concrètes pour alléger le quotidien des aidants et permettre aux enfants de s’épanouir dans un cadre adapté et inclusif.

- Offrir des moments de répit essentiels aux aidants pour souffler et se ressourcer.
- Proposer un accueil éducatif, ludique et adapté aux besoins des enfants en situation de handicap.
- Sensibiliser à la diversité et promouvoir l’inclusion à travers des projets et actions locales.
 - Développer un réseau de solidarité grâce à des bénévoles formés et engagés.

Le Dispositif 1H
Parce que chaque geste compte, nous avons mis en place le dispositif "1H" : 1 heure de répit, 1 heure d’activité pour un enfant. Ce programme permet aux aidants de bénéficier d’un moment pour eux, tout en offrant à leur enfant des activités éducatives et adaptées, encadrées par nos bénévoles et professionnels formés.

Nos Services
- Accueil éducatif et adapté : ateliers pédagogiques, activités sportives et moments d’éveil.
- Répit pour les familles : temps dédiés pour alléger la charge mentale et physique des aidants.
- Sensibilisation et formation : programmes pour mieux comprendre et accompagner le handicap au quotidien.
- Café des Aidants : espaces d’échanges et de partage pour sortir de l’isolement et construire des solutions ensemble.

Pourquoi "La Bulle de Jade" ?
La Bulle de Jade, c’est avant tout une histoire d’amour et d’espoir. Inspirée par Jade, une enfant dont la lumière et l’intensité dépassent les mots, cette initiative vise à offrir à d’autres familles un cocon bienveillant et rassurant.

Rejoignez-nous !

Name: The Washington State Developmental Disabilities Council
Description:
The Developmental Disabilities Council (DDC) advocates for better services and supports for people with developmental disabilities and their families.

The DDC was established in 1976 through an executive order from the Governor. We are funded by the federal government, are independent of the state government, and are guided by a federal law called the Developmental Disabilities Assistance and Bill of Rights Act, often called the “DD Act” for short. There is a Developmental Disabilities Council in every state and territory across the country.

We collaborate and coordinate with other agencies and organizations, train leaders and advocates, and advocate for better policies, programs, and practices. Everything we do is based on our core values of self-determination, independence, inclusion, integration, and productivity for people with developmental disabilities.

To advocate, promote, and implement policies and practices to create pathways to meaningful, integrated, and productive lives for people with Intellectual and Developmental Disabilities over the life course.

In other words, our job is to understand the needs of people with developmental disabilities and their families, and to figure out ways to improve the system so that it supports people to live successfully in the community.

Council members are appointed by the Governor to serve three-year terms. At least 60% of our members are required to be people with developmental disabilities and family members of people with developmental disabilities. Other members are representatives from state agencies and other organizations we work with. Council membership must reflect the diversity of communities across Washington State. 

This includes geographic location, disability identity, and racial/ethnic identity. Each year there are openings on the Council and we are always accepting applications.

 Rozwoju – prowadzimy szkolenia w zakresie obsługi klienta z niepełnosprawnością, języka prostego oraz organizacji wydarzeń dostępnych dla każdego. Pomagamy innym podnosić swoje kompetencje i rozwijać wrażliwość. Nie zapominamy przy tym, że sami również potrzebujemy aktualizować swoją wiedzę.

Co nas wyróżnia?

 Profesjonalizm i zaangażowanie

Nasze usługi i produkty tworzymy dla siebie samych, ponieważ większość zatrudnionych w Centrum Wsparcia pracowników to osoby z niepełnosprawnością.

 Kompleksowość
    
Współpracujemy z wieloma ekspertami w zakresie dostępności oraz sprawdzonymi parterami, by realizować zlecenia naszych klientów.

 Cel działalności

Jesteśmy przedsiębiorstwem społecznym. Nie działamy tylko dla zysku, ale bez niego nie moglibyśmy funkcjonować jak inne firmy.

Name: Vivability Limited
Description:
Vivability is a leading provider of services to people with disability in the Bathurst NSW. It has operated for the last 36years in Bathurst.

Our services include Supported Accommodation, Respite, Drop In Support, Day Programs, Work Training programs, Recreation, Therapy services, Behavioural Intervention and Support Coordination. All of our services are designed around individual clients with a focus on increasing  independence, self-determination and community participation.

Vivability supports a wide range of people including children, adults, people who are aging and people from different cultural backgrounds.

Vivability is actively involved in the community where services are based. We have established strong local networks with partner organisations, businesses and residents.

Programs equip individuals to respond to life’s challenges and be active members of the community.

As a leader in the disability sector Vivability strives to provide the best services available to our clients. To enable us to do this we have developed the organisation to ensure we are able to provide services that are unique, flexible and guided  by sound clinical practice.

Vivability is committed to being recognised as a “go to” well - resourced organisation in regards to specialist services. Services include therapy and a Behavioural Intervention Teams which guide clinical practice. Our services are available to individuals as well as other organisations.

Vivability is committed to broader sector development and is working to train and provide our staff with the opportunity to achieve nationally recognised qualifications. We believe that this makes a significant contribution to developing a skilled workforce. We believe that strong advocacy should be apart of our service for each client.

The model of support is person centred that is, the person with disability is at the centre of decision making.

Description:

Det er viktig for Verdig Omsorg å danne god kjennskap og en varig relasjon til den en tilbringer tid sammen med. Innholdet tilpasses den enkeltes ønsker. Vårt mål er at den eldre skal føle seg sett og hørt den stunden vi er sammen og at møtene mellom oss skal være noe de ser frem til.

I en hektisk hverdag kan det være vondt å vite at de eldre en er glad i er ensomme og har lite å fylle dagene med. Da kan det være betryggende for deg som nær familie å vite at de har faste avtaler og noe å glede seg til hver uke.

Verdig Omsorg tilbyr et fleksibelt og skreddersydd opplegg tilpasset den enkelte. Tid og interesse er et av det viktigste målene i vårt arbeid. Vi ønsker å bidra til en mer innholdsrik alderdom.

Description:

That’s why we are committed to providing the highest quality of care and support to community members in need.
Our dedicated team fills in missing support gaps in the lives of our vulnerable community members and are focused on high quality care and support for each individual. Our team of qualified professionals uses their extensive experience and knowledge to support each client to live independently with rewarding quality of live.
While many of our services are aligned with current NDIS care standards, we continuously tailor these programs to meet the unique needs of our clients. Our qualified and experienced staff members can adapt to various low and high-intensity requirements to serve each client with the utmost care and consideration.
A significant part of our encouragement includes navigating the often-complex world of the NDIS. There are many steps along the way that must be addressed to ensure our clients and their loved ones are appropriately supported. We take the time to explain and guide clients through this process.
At Flair Community Care we believe everyone deserves to live a fulfilling life, and we are dedicated to making that happen.
