Name: Kindrēd
Description:
At Kindrēd Gifts, we believe that the act of gift-giving is more than just an exchange—it’s a bridge that connects generations, tells a story, and creates lasting memories. Founded in Toronto, we saw a gap in how grandparents navigate the modern world of meaningful gift-giving. Many of them want to show their love through thoughtful gestures but often face challenges like understanding the preferences of a new generation, accessing the right stores, or even finding the time and mobility to make it all happen. That’s where we come in.

We’re not just a service; we’re a movement to reimagine how seniors experience gifting. Think of us as a concierge for connection. Our team pairs each grandparent with a dedicated volunteer who guides them through the entire process—from understanding their grandchild’s unique interests to visiting local shops and curating the perfect gift. We don’t stop there. Through partnerships with local businesses, we bring value back into the community, ensuring every dollar spent has a ripple effect on the neighborhood.

Kindrēd Gifts started with one simple goal: to make gift-giving personal again. In today’s fast-paced, digital-first world, the little things can get lost—like the joy of a thoughtfully chosen gift or the smile that follows. For us, it’s about more than the gift itself; it’s about the stories and emotions behind it. With each interaction, we aim to empower grandparents to feel confident, connected, and celebrated in their roles as family anchors.

This is just the beginning. As we grow, we envision Kindrēd Gifts evolving into a global leader in senior concierge services, with offerings like Kindrēd Karts for grocery shopping and Kindrēd Kare for personalized assistance. But at the heart of it all, our mission remains the same: to bring back the human touch in every interaction and make every gift a story worth sharing.

Name: LillitgaenzKosmosHigh- School
Description:
"LillitgaenzKosmosHigh- Schule Lil.lit.lil.les.Fraternity" ist eine Bildungseinrichtung, die weit über die traditionelle Lehrmethode hinausgeht. Unsere Schule ist eine lebendige Gemeinschaft, die Schüler dazu ermutigt, ihre Talente zu entdecken, zu kultivieren und zu entfalten. Unsere ganzheitliche Bildungsphilosophie berücksichtigt nicht nur akademische Exzellenz, sondern auch die persönliche und soziale Entwicklung jedes einzelnen Schülers.

In unseren Klassenzimmern fördern wir ein Umfeld des aktiven Lernens, in dem Schüler ermutigt werden, Fragen zu stellen, Hypothesen aufzustellen und kritisch zu denken. Wir glauben, dass Bildung nicht nur aus dem Auswendiglernen von Fakten besteht, sondern vielmehr aus dem Verständnis und der Anwendung von Konzepten in realen Situationen.

Unsere Lehrkräfte sind nicht nur Wissensvermittler, sondern auch Mentoren und Coaches. Sie unterstützen die Schüler dabei, ihre Interessen zu erkunden und ihre Fähigkeiten zu entwickeln. Wir glauben daran, dass jeder Schüler einzigartig ist und individuelle Aufmerksamkeit verdient, um sein volles Potenzial zu entfalten.

Abseits des Klassenzimmers bietet unsere Schule eine Vielzahl von außerschulischen Aktivitäten und Programmen, die die soziale Entwicklung und das Gemeinschaftsgefühl fördern. Von künstlerischen Workshops über Sportmannschaften bis hin zu gemeinnützigen Projekten gibt es für jeden Schüler Möglichkeiten, sich zu engagieren und Verantwortung zu übernehmen.

Unsere Absolventen verlassen unsere Schule nicht nur mit einem fundierten Wissen, sondern auch mit einem starken Gefühl der Eigenverantwortung und des sozialen Bewusstseins. Sie sind bereit, die Herausforderungen der Welt anzunehmen und positive Veränderungen herbeizuführen, sei es in ihrer lokalen Gemeinschaft oder auf globaler Ebene.
Gründung am Tag der Wahl des 
Europäischen Parlament 09.06.2024 Wünsche Euch viel Glück, Erfolg und die Verwirklichung von Frieden, Hoffnung, Nächstenliebe, Freiheit und Vergebung Zuversicht.

Name: Associação Familiares Amigos do Down (AFAD)
Description: Em março de 2019 a AFAD Cachoeira do Sul comemorou 25 anos de atuação junto à comunidade Cachoeirense. A AFAD é uma Associação sem fins lucrativos que foi fundada em março de 1994. Sua missão é lutar pela eliminação de barreiras, de qualquer natureza, que impeçam a construção de cidadania plena das pessoas com deficiências. Em julho de 1994, para concretizar seus objetivos, foi criado um Centro que desde sua fundação, assumiu a tarefa de encaminhar pessoas com Síndrome de Down para as escolas comuns e realizar atendimento de apoio no turno inverso. Uma das nossas lutas é defender os direitos das pessoas com Síndrome de Down no que se refere à inclusão na escola, na família, no trabalho e na sociedade. Em Cachoeira do Sul, a AFAD foi pioneira na inclusão escolar, na formação de profissionais da educação e no apoio às famílias para concretizar com qualidade este processo. Atividades desenvolvidas pela Instituição: – AEE – Atendimento Educacional Especializado – Acompanhamento dos alunos atendidos nas escolas regulares. – Reuniões com professores e equipe diretivas – Formação continuada para educadores – Palestras para comunidade em Geral – Oficinas de culinária – Grupo de danças em Parcerias com outras instituições sociais – Oficina de Arte – Gameterapia – Grupos e atendimentos com psicóloga conforme disponibilidade.

Description:
At Access Your Ability Solutions (AYAS), we’re redefining what quality disability support feels like — personal, empowering, and built on real connection.

We’re a Gold Coast and Brisbane–based team that believes support work should feel personal, genuine, and human. Every day, we focus on creating real connections, meaningful growth, and a sense of belonging — both for the people we support and the carers who show up with heart.

For us, it’s not just about showing up, it’s about showing up with heart — bringing warmth, laughter, and effort into every shift.

Our approach is simple: we match participants with support workers who get them — people they can laugh with, trust, and build long-term consistency with. Whether it’s daily living, community outings, short-term accommodation, or helping someone chase new goals, we lead with compassion, reliability, and a genuine love for what we do.

We charge less than other providers and pay our carers more then the industry standard — because when people feel valued, they give their best. That’s the AYAS difference.

Founded by Sebastian Luca, born and raised on the Gold Coast, AYAS was built from the belief that disability support should go beyond ticking boxes — it should bring happiness, purpose, and empowerment into everyday life.

At AYAS, we’re not just supporting people, we’re helping them access their ability.

Name: SILVEC Technologies
Description: Europe is aging rapidly: by 2050, nearly one-third of the population will be over 65. This means more fall incidents, more loneliness, and higher healthcare costs. SILVEC is developing a technology ecosystem that helps older adults live longer independently, safely, and with dignity. Our first solutions are the hip airbag, which prevents falls and reduces injury, and a companion robot that strengthens social connectedness. What makes us unique: we combine fall prevention and social interaction in one system. This creates value for older adults themselves while providing peace of mind and insight for families and caregivers. Together with partners in the Netherlands and China, we are working on pilots and European localization. Our ambition: to build the leading ecosystem for the Silver Economy in Europe.

Name: Fresh Ideas & Solutions CIC
Description:
Fresh Ideas & Solutions Services (FISS) is a Community Interest Company that was established in 2011.  It was born out of a need to help people to retain control of their own Personal Budgets and to enable them to be given the chance to choose and employ their own Personal Assistants.

At Fresh Ideas we understand how daunting it could be left with the responsibility and risk of being an employer and this is where we hope to be of assistance.  We take away the hassle of being an employer by helping individuals to choose their personal assistants and employ them on their behalf.

We offer a range of services to help organise and manage your day-to-day routine.  So if you want to choose who supports you in your own home or what your schedule should be on a daily basis we at Fresh Ideas  are committed to help.

Do You...?

    Want to have choice in organising your own Personal Budgets?
    Want assistance with devising a Support Plan which helps you to realise your   aspirations?
    Want to decide on who comes to your home and when?
    Want your Personal Assistants to be trained to your specific needs?

At Fresh Ideas we are feverant believers in the Personalisation of care.  We work with you to tailor Personal Budgets to suit your needs, giving you a greater freedom of choice and allowing you to take control of your support at home.
